{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarIds;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.index.FxIndex;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountFactors;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.ZeroRateSensitivity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX barrier option products in Black-Scholes world.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n * <p>\n * All the computation is based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n */\npublic class BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer DEFAULT = new BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer();\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for barrier option without rebate.\n   */\n  private static final BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository BARRIER_PRICER = new BlackBarrierPriceFormulaRepository();\n  /**\n   * Pricer for rebate.\n   */\n  private static final BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository ASSET_REBATE_PRICER =\n      new BlackOneTouchAssetPriceFormulaRepository();\n  /**\n   * Pricer for rebate.\n   */\n  private static final BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository CASH_REBATE_PRICER =\n      new BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository();\n  /**\n   * Pricer for underlying vanilla option.\n   */\n  private static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER =\n      BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n   * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * The volatility used in this computation is the Black implied volatility at expiry time and strike.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * price);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \n   * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n   * See {@link #presentValue} for scaling and currency.\n   * <p>\n   * The volatility used in this computation is the Black implied volatility at expiry time and strike.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n    Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.price(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        double rebatePrice = rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\n            Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n        return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? rebatePrice : todayFx * rebatePrice;\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n    DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n    double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n    double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n    double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, underlyingOption.getExpiry(), strike, forward);\n    double price = BARRIER_PRICER.price(\n        todayFx, strike, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall(), barrier);\n    if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n      double priceRebate = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n          CASH_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType()) :\n          ASSET_REBATE_PRICER.price(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType());\n      price += priceRebate * rebate.getAmount() / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    }\n    return price;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n   * the underlying curves.\n   * <p>\n   * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation, i.e., sticky-strike.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the product\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        PointSensitivities underlyingOptionSensitivity = VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n            option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n        return PointSensitivityBuilder.of(underlyingOptionSensitivity.getSensitivities());\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        ZeroRateSensitivity rebaseSensitivity = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency())\n            .zeroRatePointSensitivity(paymentDate);\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n            rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount()) :\n            rebaseSensitivity.multipliedBy(rebate.getAmount() * todayFx).withCurrency(ccyCounter);\n      }\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\n    double counterYearFraction =\n        ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getCounter()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    ZeroRateSensitivity counterSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\n        currencyPair.getCounter(),\n        counterYearFraction,\n        signedNotional * (priceDerivatives.getDerivative(2) + priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3)));\n    double baseYearFraction =\n        ratesProvider.discountFactors(currencyPair.getBase()).relativeYearFraction(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    ZeroRateSensitivity baseSensi = ZeroRateSensitivity.of(\n        currencyPair.getBase(),\n        baseYearFraction,\n        currencyPair.getCounter(),\n        -priceDerivatives.getDerivative(3) * signedNotional);\n    return counterSensi.combinedWith(baseSensi);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value delta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value delta is the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value delta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueDelta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double delta = delta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * delta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the delta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the delta of the product\n   */\n  public double delta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.delta(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        if (!rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter)) {\n          DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n          LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n          return rebate.getAmount() * ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate) /\n              Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n        }\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value gamma of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value gamma is the second derivative of {@link #presentValue} with respect to spot.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value gamma of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueGamma(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double gamma = gamma(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * gamma);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the gamma of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The delta is the second derivative of {@link #price} with respect to spot.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the gamma of the product\n   */\n  public double gamma(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.gamma(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(6);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used. This is also called Black vega.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n            option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      }\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Currency ccyBase = currencyPair.getBase();\n    Currency ccyCounter = currencyPair.getCounter();\n    double dfBase = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyBase, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double dfCounter = ratesProvider.discountFactor(ccyCounter, underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n    return FxOptionSensitivity.of(\n        volatilities.getName(),\n        currencyPair,\n        timeToExpiry,\n        underlyingOption.getStrike(),\n        forward,\n        ccyCounter,\n        priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4) * signedNotional(underlyingOption));\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the vega of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The delta is the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to Black volatility.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the vega of the product\n   */\n  public double vega(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.vega(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return priceDerivatives.getDerivative(4);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value theta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #presentValue} with time parameter.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value theta of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueTheta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    double theta = theta(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * theta);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the theta of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The theta is the negative of the first derivative of {@link #price} with respect to time parameter.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the theta of the product\n   */\n  public double theta(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n        DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n        double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n        double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n        double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n        double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n        double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, timeToExpiry, strike, forward);\n        boolean isCall = underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall();\n        double fwdPrice = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n        double fwdTheta = BlackFormulaRepository.driftlessTheta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility);\n        double fwdDelta = BlackFormulaRepository.delta(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, volatility, isCall);\n        return dfCounter * (fwdTheta + rateCounter * fwdPrice - costOfCarry * forward * fwdDelta);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        DiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(rebate.getCurrency());\n        double rebateTheta = discountFactors.zeroRate(paymentDate) * rebate.getAmount() *\n            discountFactors.discountFactor(paymentDate) / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n        return rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? rebateTheta : todayFx * rebateTheta;\n      }\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return -priceDerivatives.getDerivative(5);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the forward exchange rate.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the forward rate\n   */\n  public FxRate forwardFxRate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option, RatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getCurrencyPair();\n    LocalDate paymentDate = option.getUnderlyingOption().getUnderlying().getPaymentDate();\n    double forwardRate = ratesProvider.fxForwardRates(strikePair).rate(strikePair.getBase(), paymentDate);\n    return FxRate.of(strikePair, forwardRate);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the implied Black volatility of the FX barrier option product.\n   *\n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the implied volatility of the product\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the option has expired\n   */\n  public double impliedVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ZonedDateTime expiry = option.getUnderlyingOption().getExpiry();\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(expiry);\n    if (timeToExpiry <= 0d) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"valuation is after option's expiry.\");\n    }\n    FxRate forward = forwardFxRate(option, ratesProvider);\n    CurrencyPair strikePair = option.getCurrencyPair();\n    double strike = option.getUnderlyingOption().getStrike();\n    return volatilities.volatility(strikePair, expiry, strike, forward.fxRate(strikePair));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX barrier option product.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n    }\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    if (alreadyTouched(todayFx, barrier)) {\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {\n        return VANILLA_OPTION_PRICER.currencyExposure(underlyingOption, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n      } else if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n        CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n        DaysAdjustment spotLag = spotAdjustment(currencyPair);\n        LocalDate paymentDate = spotLag.adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), ReferenceData.standard());\n        double pv = (option.getUnderlyingOption().getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) * rebate.getAmount() *\n            ratesProvider.discountFactor(rebate.getCurrency(), paymentDate);\n        Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n        double ceAmount = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ? pv : todayFx * pv;\n        return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(ccyCounter, ceAmount);\n      }\n      return MultiCurrencyAmount.empty();\n    }\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    double price = priceDerivatives.getValue();\n    double delta = priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * todayFx) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  //  The derivatives are [0] spot, [1] strike, [2] rate, [3] cost-of-carry, [4] volatility, [5] timeToExpiry, [6] spot twice\n  private ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    validate(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double[] derivatives = new double[7];\n    if (volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()) < 0d) {\n      return ValueDerivatives.of(0d, DoubleArray.ofUnsafe(derivatives));\n    }\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    Currency ccyBase = currencyPair.getBase();\n    Currency ccyCounter = currencyPair.getCounter();\n    DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n    DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n\n    double rateBase = baseDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double rateCounter = counterDiscountFactors.zeroRate(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double costOfCarry = rateCounter - rateBase;\n    double dfBase = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double dfCounter = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(underlyingFx.getPaymentDate());\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double strike = underlyingOption.getStrike();\n    double forward = todayFx * dfBase / dfCounter;\n    double volatility = volatilities.volatility(currencyPair, underlyingOption.getExpiry(), strike, forward);\n    double timeToExpiry = volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry());\n    ValueDerivatives valueDerivatives = BARRIER_PRICER.priceAdjoint(\n        todayFx, strike, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, underlyingOption.getPutCall().isCall(), barrier);\n    if (!option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n      return valueDerivatives;\n    }\n    CurrencyAmount rebate = option.getRebate().get();\n    ValueDerivatives valueDerivativesRebate = rebate.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter) ?\n        CASH_REBATE_PRICER.priceAdjoint(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType()) :\n        ASSET_REBATE_PRICER.priceAdjoint(todayFx, timeToExpiry, costOfCarry, rateCounter, volatility, barrier.inverseKnockType());\n    double rebateRate = rebate.getAmount() / Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    double price = valueDerivatives.getValue() + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getValue();\n    derivatives[0] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(0) + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getDerivative(0);\n    derivatives[1] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(1);\n    for (int i = 2; i < 7; ++i) {\n      derivatives[i] = valueDerivatives.getDerivative(i) + rebateRate * valueDerivativesRebate.getDerivative(i - 1);\n    }\n    return ValueDerivatives.of(price, DoubleArray.ofUnsafe(derivatives));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculate spot lag for rebate\n  private DaysAdjustment spotAdjustment(CurrencyPair currencyPair) {\n    return FxIndex.extendedEnum().lookupAll().values().stream()\n        .filter(index -> index.getCurrencyPair().equals(currencyPair))\n        .findFirst()\n        .map(FxIndex::getFixingDateOffset)\n        .map(adjustment -> adjustment.toBuilder().days(-adjustment.getDays()).build())\n        .orElseGet(() -> DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(2, calendarForPair(currencyPair)));\n  }\n\n  private HolidayCalendarId calendarForPair(CurrencyPair pair) {\n    return pair.toSet().stream()\n        .map(currency -> defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(currency))\n        .reduce(HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS, HolidayCalendarId::combinedWith);\n  }\n\n  private HolidayCalendarId defaultByCurrencyOrNoHolidays(Currency currency) {\n    try {\n      return HolidayCalendarId.defaultByCurrency(currency);\n    } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {\n      return HolidayCalendarIds.NO_HOLIDAYS;\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  private void validate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(option.getBarrier() instanceof SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier,\n        \"Barrier should be SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(ratesProvider.getValuationDate().isEqual(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate()),\n        \"Volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n  }\n\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n  private boolean alreadyTouched(double fxRate, SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier) {\n    if (barrier.getBarrierType().isDown()) {\n      return fxRate <= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\n    }\n    return fxRate >= barrier.getBarrierLevel();\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackOneTouchCashPriceFormulaRepository;",

        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;",
        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;",

  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.ImmutableRatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.ImmutableRatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.util.Arrays;\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Map.Entry;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.math.DoubleMath;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.value.ValueDerivatives;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.Curve;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountFactors;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.tree.ConstantContinuousSingleBarrierKnockoutFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.tree.EuropeanVanillaOptionFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.tree.TrinomialTree;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.ImmutableRatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX barrier option products under implied trinomial tree.\n * <p>\n * This function provides the ability to price an {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n * <p>\n * All of the computation is be based on the counter currency of the underlying FX transaction.\n * For example, price, PV and risk measures of the product will be expressed in USD for an option on EUR/USD.\n */\npublic class ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * The trinomial tree.\n   */\n  private static final TrinomialTree TREE = new TrinomialTree();\n  /**\n   * Small parameter.\n   */\n  private static final double SMALL = 1.0e-12;\n  /**\n   * Default number of time steps.\n   */\n  private static final int NUM_STEPS_DEFAULT = 51;\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer DEFAULT =\n      new ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer(NUM_STEPS_DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Number of time steps.\n   */\n  private final ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxOptionCalibrator calibrator;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer with the default number of time steps.\n   */\n  public ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer() {\n    this(NUM_STEPS_DEFAULT);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer with the specified number of time steps.\n   * \n   * @param nSteps  number of time steps\n   */\n  public ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer(int nSteps) {\n    this.calibrator = new ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxOptionCalibrator(nSteps);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains the calibrator.\n   * \n   * @return the calibrator\n   */\n  public ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxOptionCalibrator getCalibrator() {\n    return calibrator;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \n   * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n   * See {@linkplain #presentValue(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption, RatesProvider, BlackFxOptionVolatilities) presentValue} \n   * for scaling and currency.\n   * <p>\n   * The trinomial tree is first calibrated to Black volatilities, \n   * then the price is computed based on the calibrated tree.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    RecombiningTrinomialTreeData treeData =\n        calibrator.calibrateTrinomialTree(option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, treeData);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The price of the product is the value on the valuation date for one unit of the base currency \n   * and is expressed in the counter currency. The price does not take into account the long/short flag.\n   * See {@linkplain #presentValue(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption, RatesProvider, BlackFxOptionVolatilities, RecombiningTrinomialTreeData) presnetValue} \n   * for scaling and currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This assumes the tree is already calibrated and the tree data is stored as {@code RecombiningTrinomialTreeData}.\n   * The tree data should be consistent with the pricer and other inputs, see {@link #validateData}.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @param treeData  the trinomial tree data\n   * @return the price of the product\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      RecombiningTrinomialTreeData treeData) {\n\n    return priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, treeData).getValue();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n   * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * The trinomial tree is first calibrated to Black volatilities, \n   * then the price is computed based on the calibrated tree.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    RecombiningTrinomialTreeData treeData =\n        calibrator.calibrateTrinomialTree(option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return presentValue(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, treeData);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the product is the value on the valuation date.\n   * It is expressed in the counter currency.\n   * <p>\n   * This assumes the tree is already calibrated and the tree data is stored as {@code RecombiningTrinomialTreeData}.\n   * The tree data should be consistent with the pricer and other inputs, see {@link #validateData}.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @param treeData  the trinomial tree data\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      RecombiningTrinomialTreeData treeData) {\n\n    double price = price(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, treeData);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(underlyingOption.getCounterCurrency(), signedNotional(underlyingOption) * price);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n   * the underlying curve parameters.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivity is computed by bump and re-price.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRates(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    RecombiningTrinomialTreeData baseTreeData =\n        calibrator.calibrateTrinomialTree(option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return presentValueSensitivityRates(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, baseTreeData);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of {@link #presentValue} to\n   * the underlying curve parameters.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivity is computed by bump and re-price.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @param baseTreeData  the trinomial tree data\n   * @return the present value of the product\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRates(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      RecombiningTrinomialTreeData baseTreeData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(baseTreeData.getNumberOfSteps() == calibrator.getNumberOfSteps(),\n        \"the number of steps mismatch between pricer and trinomial tree data\");\n    double shift = 1.0e-5;\n    CurrencyAmount pvBase = presentValue(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, baseTreeData);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingFx.getCurrencyPair();\n    ImmutableRatesProvider immRatesProvider = ratesProvider.toImmutableRatesProvider();\n    ImmutableMap<Currency, Curve> baseCurves = immRatesProvider.getDiscountCurves();\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities result = CurrencyParameterSensitivities.empty();\n\n    for (Entry<Currency, Curve> entry : baseCurves.entrySet()) {\n      if (currencyPair.contains(entry.getKey())) {\n        Curve curve = entry.getValue();\n        int nParams = curve.getParameterCount();\n        DoubleArray sensitivity = DoubleArray.of(nParams, i -> {\n          Curve dscBumped = curve.withParameter(i, curve.getParameter(i) + shift);\n          Map<Currency, Curve> mapBumped = new HashMap<>(baseCurves);\n          mapBumped.put(entry.getKey(), dscBumped);\n          ImmutableRatesProvider providerDscBumped = immRatesProvider.toBuilder().discountCurves(mapBumped).build();\n          double pvBumped = presentValue(option, providerDscBumped, volatilities).getAmount();\n          return (pvBumped - pvBase.getAmount()) / shift;\n        });\n        result = result.combinedWith(curve.createParameterSensitivity(pvBase.getCurrency(), sensitivity));\n      }\n    }\n    return result;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * The trinomial tree is first calibrated to Black volatilities, \n   * then the price is computed based on the calibrated tree.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    RecombiningTrinomialTreeData treeData =\n        calibrator.calibrateTrinomialTree(option.getUnderlyingOption(), ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    return currencyExposure(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, treeData);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX barrier option product.\n   * <p>\n   * This assumes the tree is already calibrated and the tree data is stored as {@code RecombiningTrinomialTreeData}.\n   * The tree data should be consistent with the pricer and other inputs, see {@link #validateData}.\n   * \n   * @param option  the option product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @param treeData  the trinomial tree data\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      RecombiningTrinomialTreeData treeData) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives = priceDerivatives(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, treeData);\n    double price = priceDerivatives.getValue();\n    double delta = priceDerivatives.getDerivative(0);\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = underlyingOption.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair();\n    double todayFx = ratesProvider.fxRate(currencyPair);\n    double signedNotional = signedNotional(underlyingOption);\n    CurrencyAmount domestic = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getCounter(), (price - delta * todayFx) * signedNotional);\n    CurrencyAmount foreign = CurrencyAmount.of(currencyPair.getBase(), delta * signedNotional);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(domestic, foreign);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  private ValueDerivatives priceDerivatives(\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      RecombiningTrinomialTreeData data) {\n\n    validate(option, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    validateData(option, ratesProvider, volatilities, data);\n    int nSteps = data.getNumberOfSteps();\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    double timeToExpiry = data.getTime(nSteps);\n    ResolvedFxSingle underlyingFx = underlyingOption.getUnderlying();\n    Currency ccyBase = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n    Currency ccyCounter = underlyingFx.getCounterCurrencyPayment().getCurrency();\n    DiscountFactors baseDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyBase);\n    DiscountFactors counterDiscountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(ccyCounter);\n    double rebateAtExpiry = 0d; // used to price knock-in option\n    double rebateAtExpiryDerivative = 0d; // used to price knock-in option\n    double notional = Math.abs(underlyingFx.getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n    double[] rebateArray = new double[nSteps + 1];\n    SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier barrier = (SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier) option.getBarrier();\n    if (option.getRebate().isPresent()) {\n      CurrencyAmount rebateCurrencyAmount = option.getRebate().get();\n      double rebatePerUnit = rebateCurrencyAmount.getAmount() / notional;\n      boolean isCounter = rebateCurrencyAmount.getCurrency().equals(ccyCounter);\n      double rebate = isCounter ? rebatePerUnit : rebatePerUnit * barrier.getBarrierLevel();\n      if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) { // use in-out parity\n        double dfCounterAtExpiry = counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(timeToExpiry);\n        double dfBaseAtExpiry = baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(timeToExpiry);\n        for (int i = 0; i < nSteps + 1; ++i) {\n          rebateArray[i] = isCounter ?\n              rebate * dfCounterAtExpiry / counterDiscountFactors.discountFactor(data.getTime(i)) :\n              rebate * dfBaseAtExpiry / baseDiscountFactors.discountFactor(data.getTime(i));\n        }\n        if (isCounter) {\n          rebateAtExpiry = rebatePerUnit * dfCounterAtExpiry;\n        } else {\n          rebateAtExpiry = rebatePerUnit * data.getSpot() * dfBaseAtExpiry;\n          rebateAtExpiryDerivative = rebatePerUnit * dfBaseAtExpiry;\n        }\n      } else {\n        Arrays.fill(rebateArray, rebate);\n      }\n    }\n    ConstantContinuousSingleBarrierKnockoutFunction barrierFunction = ConstantContinuousSingleBarrierKnockoutFunction.of(\n        underlyingOption.getStrike(),\n        timeToExpiry,\n        underlyingOption.getPutCall(),\n        nSteps,\n        barrier.getBarrierType(),\n        barrier.getBarrierLevel(),\n        DoubleArray.ofUnsafe(rebateArray));\n    ValueDerivatives barrierPrice = TREE.optionPriceAdjoint(barrierFunction, data);\n    if (barrier.getKnockType().isKnockIn()) {  // use in-out parity\n      EuropeanVanillaOptionFunction vanillaFunction = EuropeanVanillaOptionFunction.of(\n          underlyingOption.getStrike(), timeToExpiry, underlyingOption.getPutCall(), nSteps);\n      ValueDerivatives vanillaPrice = TREE.optionPriceAdjoint(vanillaFunction, data);\n      return ValueDerivatives.of(vanillaPrice.getValue() + rebateAtExpiry - barrierPrice.getValue(),\n          DoubleArray.of(vanillaPrice.getDerivative(0) + rebateAtExpiryDerivative - barrierPrice.getDerivative(0)));\n    }\n    return barrierPrice;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  private void validateData(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      RecombiningTrinomialTreeData data) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption underlyingOption = option.getUnderlyingOption();\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(DoubleMath.fuzzyEquals(data.getTime(data.getNumberOfSteps()),\n        volatilities.relativeTime(underlyingOption.getExpiry()), SMALL),\n        \"time to expiry mismatch between pricing option and trinomial tree data\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(DoubleMath.fuzzyEquals(data.getSpot(),\n        ratesProvider.fxRate(underlyingOption.getUnderlying().getCurrencyPair()), SMALL),\n        \"today's FX rate mismatch between rates provider and trinomial tree data\");\n  }\n\n  private void validate(ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption option,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(option.getBarrier() instanceof SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier,\n        \"barrier should be SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(\n        ratesProvider.getValuationDate().isEqual(volatilities.getValuationDateTime().toLocalDate()),\n        \"Volatility and rate data must be for the same date\");\n  }\n\n  // signed notional amount to computed present value and value Greeks\n  private double signedNotional(ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option) {\n    return (option.getLongShort().isLong() ? 1d : -1d) *\n        Math.abs(option.getUnderlying().getBaseCurrencyPayment().getAmount());\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.ImmutableRatesProvider;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;",
        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;",
        " ",
        " /**"
      ],
      "newLines": 8,
      "newStart": 28,
      "oldLines": 8,
      "oldStart": 28
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

71. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/fix_test_imports.sh << 'EOF'\n#!/bin/bash\n\ncd /workspace\n\n# Fix BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest\nsed -i '/import.*FxEuropeanOptionTrade/d; /import.*ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/{s/.*//;x;s/^/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\\n/;x;}' modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest.java\n\n# More direct approach - read and fix each file\nfix_test_file() {\n    local file=\"$1\"\n    if [ ! -f \"$file\" ]; then\n        return\n    fi\n    \n    # Get the line numbers where imports are\n    local lines=$(grep -n \"import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.*\" \"$file\" | cut -d: -f1)\n    \n    # Extract all fxopt imports\n    local imports=$(grep \"import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.*\" \"$file\" | sort)\n    \n    if [ ! -z \"$imports\" ]; then\n        # Delete old imports\n        sed -i '/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt/d' \"$file\"\n        \n        # Add sorted imports back after \"import com.opengamma.strata.pricer...\"\n        local insert_line=$(grep -n \"import com.opengamma.strata.pricer\" \"$file\" | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)\n        if [ -z \"$insert_line\" ]; then\n            insert_line=$(grep -n \"^import\" \"$file\" | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)\n        fi\n        \n        if [ ! -z \"$insert_line\" ]; then\n            sed -i \"${insert_line}a\\\\$(echo \"$imports\" | sed 's/$/\\\\/')\" \"$file\"\n        fi\n    fi\n}\n\n# This is getting complex - let me use Python instead\npython3 << 'PYTHON'\nimport os\nimport re\n\ndef fix_imports(filepath):\n    if not os.path.exists(filepath):\n        return\n    \n    with open(filepath, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n    \n    # Extract all imports\n    import_lines = re.findall(r'^import .*$', content, re.MULTILINE)\n    \n    # Remove duplicate/old class references\n    content = re.sub(r'FxVanillaOptionTrade\\b', 'FxEuropeanOptionTrade', content)\n    content = re.sub(r'ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade\\b', 'ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade', content)\n    content = re.sub(r'ResolvedFxVanillaOption\\b', 'ResolvedFxEuropeanOption', content)\n    content = re.sub(r'FxVanillaOption\\b', 'FxEuropeanOption', content)\n    \n    with open(filepath, 'w') as f:\n        f.write(content)\n\n# Fix test files\nfor root, dirs, files in os.walk('/workspace/modules/pricer/src/test'):\n    for file in files:\n        if file.endswith('.java'):\n            fix_imports(os.path.join(root, file))\n\nfor root, dirs, files in os.walk('/workspace/modules/measure/src/test'):\n    for file in files:\n        if file.endswith('.java'):\n            fix_imports(os.path.join(root, file))\n\nfor root, dirs, files in os.walk('/workspace/modules/loader/src/test'):\n    for file in files:\n        if file.endswith('.java'):\n            fix_imports(os.path.join(root, file))\n\nprint(\"Fixed test file references\")\nPYTHON\n\nEOF\nchmod +x /tmp/fix_test_imports.sh\nbash /tmp/fix_test_imports.sh\n"
}

com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_365F;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort.SHORT;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\nimport static org.assertj.core.data.Offset.offset;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.datasets.RatesProviderDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.RatesProviderFxDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n\n\n/**\n * Test {@link BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer}. \n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest {\n\n  private static final LocalDate VAL_DATE = RatesProviderDataSets.VAL_DATE_2014_01_22;\n  private static final LocalTime VAL_TIME = LocalTime.of(13, 45);\n  private static final ZoneId ZONE = ZoneId.of(\"Z\");\n  private static final ZonedDateTime VAL_DATE_TIME = VAL_DATE.atTime(VAL_TIME).atZone(ZONE);\n  private static final ZonedDateTime EXPIRY = ZonedDateTime.of(2014, 5, 9, 13, 10, 0, 0, ZONE);\n\n  private static final FxMatrix FX_MATRIX = RatesProviderFxDataSets.fxMatrix();",

  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.EUR;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.USD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_365F;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort.SHORT;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\nimport static org.assertj.core.data.Offset.offset;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxMatrix;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleMatrix;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.datasets.RatesProviderDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.RatesProviderFxDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\n\n\n/**\n * Test {@link BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer}. \n */\npublic class BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest {\n\n  private static final LocalDate VAL_DATE = RatesProviderDataSets.VAL_DATE_2014_01_22;\n  private static final LocalTime VAL_TIME = LocalTime.of(13, 45);\n  private static final ZoneId ZONE = ZoneId.of(\"Z\");\n  private static final ZonedDateTime VAL_DATE_TIME = VAL_DATE.atTime(VAL_TIME).atZone(ZONE);\n  private static final ZonedDateTime EXPIRY = ZonedDateTime.of(2014, 5, 9, 13, 10, 0, 0, ZONE);\n\n  private static final FxMatrix FX_MATRIX = RatesProviderFxDataSets.fxMatrix();\n  private static final RatesProvider RATES_PROVIDER = RatesProviderFxDataSets.createProviderEURUSD(VAL_DATE);\n\n  private static final DoubleArray TIME_TO_EXPIRY = DoubleArray.of(0.01, 0.252, 0.501, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0);\n  private static final DoubleArray ATM = DoubleArray.of(0.175, 0.185, 0.18, 0.17, 0.16, 0.16);\n  private static final DoubleArray DELTA = DoubleArray.of(0.10, 0.25);\n  private static final DoubleMatrix RISK_REVERSAL = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {-0.010, -0.0050}, {-0.011, -0.0060}, {-0.012, -0.0070},\n      {-0.013, -0.0080}, {-0.014, -0.0090}, {-0.014, -0.0090}});\n  private static final DoubleMatrix STRANGLE = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {0.0300, 0.0100}, {0.0310, 0.0110}, {0.0320, 0.0120},\n      {0.0330, 0.0130}, {0.0340, 0.0140}, {0.0340, 0.0140}});\n  private static final InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure SMILE_TERM =\n      InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure.of(TIME_TO_EXPIRY, DELTA, ATM, RISK_REVERSAL, STRANGLE, ACT_365F);\n  private static final CurrencyPair CURRENCY_PAIR = CurrencyPair.of(EUR, USD);\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS =\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities.of(FxOptionVolatilitiesName.of(\"Test\"), CURRENCY_PAIR, VAL_DATE_TIME, SMILE_TERM);\n\n  private static final LocalDate PAYMENT_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 5, 13);\n  private static final double NOTIONAL = 1.0e6;\n  private static final CurrencyAmount EUR_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, NOTIONAL);\n  private static final CurrencyAmount USD_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -NOTIONAL * FX_MATRIX.fxRate(EUR, USD));\n  private static final ResolvedFxSingle FX_PRODUCT = ResolvedFxSingle.of(EUR_AMOUNT, USD_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_DATE);\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOption OPTION_PRODUCT = ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n      .longShort(SHORT)\n      .expiry(EXPIRY)\n      .underlying(FX_PRODUCT)\n      .build();\n  private static final TradeInfo TRADE_INFO = TradeInfo.builder().tradeDate(VAL_DATE).build();\n  private static final LocalDate CASH_SETTLE_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 1, 25);\n  private static final Payment PREMIUM = Payment.of(EUR, NOTIONAL * 0.027, CASH_SETTLE_DATE);\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade OPTION_TRADE = ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n      .premium(PREMIUM)\n      .product(OPTION_PRODUCT)\n      .info(TRADE_INFO)\n      .build();\n\n  private static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer PRICER_PRODUCT = BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n  private static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer PRICER_TRADE = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n  private static final DiscountingPaymentPricer PRICER_PAYMENT = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  private static final double TOL = 1.0e-13;\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValue() {\n    MultiCurrencyAmount pvSensiTrade = PRICER_TRADE.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    CurrencyAmount pvSensiProduct = PRICER_PRODUCT.presentValue(OPTION_PRODUCT, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    CurrencyAmount pvSensiPremium = PRICER_PAYMENT.presentValue(PREMIUM, RATES_PROVIDER);\n    assertThat(pvSensiTrade).isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvSensiProduct, pvSensiPremium));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValueSensitivity() {\n    PointSensitivities pvSensiTrade = PRICER_TRADE.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n        OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    PointSensitivities pvSensiProduct = PRICER_PRODUCT.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n        OPTION_PRODUCT, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    PointSensitivities pvSensiPremium = PRICER_PAYMENT.presentValueSensitivity(PREMIUM, RATES_PROVIDER).build();\n    assertThat(pvSensiTrade).isEqualTo(pvSensiProduct.combinedWith(pvSensiPremium));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValueSensitivityBlackVolatility() {\n    PointSensitivities pvSensiTrade =\n        PRICER_TRADE.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    PointSensitivities pvSensiProduct =\n        PRICER_PRODUCT.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(OPTION_PRODUCT, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS).build();\n    assertThat(pvSensiTrade).isEqualTo(pvSensiProduct);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_currencyExposure() {\n    MultiCurrencyAmount ceComputed = PRICER_TRADE.currencyExposure(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    PointSensitivities point = PRICER_TRADE.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount pv = PRICER_TRADE.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount ceExpected = RATES_PROVIDER.currencyExposure(point).plus(pv);\n    assertThat(ceComputed.size()).isEqualTo(2);\n    assertThat(ceComputed.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceExpected.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(TOL * NOTIONAL));\n    assertThat(ceComputed.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceExpected.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(TOL * NOTIONAL));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure() {\n    MultiCurrencyAmount ceComputed = PRICER_TRADE.smileAdjustedCurrencyExposure(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    double fwdSpotSensi = PRICER_PRODUCT.getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer().forwardFxRateSpotSensitivity(\n        OPTION_PRODUCT.getPutCall().isCall() ? FX_PRODUCT : FX_PRODUCT.inverse(), RATES_PROVIDER);\n    PointSensitivities point = PRICER_PRODUCT.getDiscountingFxSingleProductPricer().forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(\n            OPTION_PRODUCT.getPutCall().isCall() ? FX_PRODUCT : FX_PRODUCT.inverse(), RATES_PROVIDER)\n        .multipliedBy(-NOTIONAL * PRICER_PRODUCT.smileAdjustedDelta(OPTION_PRODUCT, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS) / fwdSpotSensi)\n        .build();\n    MultiCurrencyAmount pv = PRICER_TRADE.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount ceExpected = RATES_PROVIDER.currencyExposure(point).plus(pv);\n    assertThat(ceComputed.size()).isEqualTo(2);\n    assertThat(ceComputed.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceExpected.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(TOL * NOTIONAL));\n    assertThat(ceComputed.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceExpected.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(TOL * NOTIONAL));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_currentCash_zero() {\n    assertThat(PRICER_TRADE.currentCash(OPTION_TRADE, VAL_DATE)).isEqualTo(CurrencyAmount.zero(PREMIUM.getCurrency()));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_currentCash_onSettle() {\n    assertThat(PRICER_TRADE.currentCash(OPTION_TRADE, CASH_SETTLE_DATE)).isEqualTo(PREMIUM.getValue());\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_forwardFxRate() {\n    FxRate fxRateComputed = PRICER_TRADE.forwardFxRate(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER);\n    FxRate fxRateExpected = PRICER_PRODUCT.forwardFxRate(OPTION_PRODUCT, RATES_PROVIDER);\n    assertThat(fxRateComputed).isEqualTo(fxRateExpected);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_impliedVolatility() {\n    double impVolComputed = PRICER_TRADE.impliedVolatility(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    double imlVolExpected = PRICER_PRODUCT.impliedVolatility(OPTION_PRODUCT, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    assertThat(impVolComputed).isEqualTo(imlVolExpected);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_delta() {\n    double delta = PRICER_TRADE.delta(OPTION_TRADE, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    double deltaExpected = PRICER_PRODUCT.delta(OPTION_PRODUCT, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n\n    assertThat(delta).isEqualTo(deltaExpected);\n  }\n\n}\n",
