com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.EUR;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.USD;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatIllegalArgumentException;\nimport static org.assertj.core.data.Offset.offset;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.RatesProviderFxDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.ImmutableRatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.RatesFiniteDifferenceSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.BarrierType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.KnockType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\n\n/**\n * Test {@link ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer}.\n */\npublic class ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricerTest {\n\n  private static final ZoneId ZONE = ZoneId.of(\"Z\");\n  private static final LocalDate VAL_DATE = LocalDate.of(2011, 6, 13);\n  private static final ZonedDateTime VAL_DATETIME = VAL_DATE.atStartOfDay(ZONE);\n  private static final LocalDate PAY_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 9, 15);\n  private static final LocalDate EXPIRY_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 9, 15);\n  private static final ZonedDateTime EXPIRY_DATETIME = EXPIRY_DATE.atStartOfDay(ZONE);\n  // providers - flat\n  private static final ImmutableRatesProvider RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT =\n      RatesProviderFxDataSets.createProviderEurUsdFlat(VAL_DATE);\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS_FLAT =\n      FxVolatilitySmileDataSet.createVolatilitySmileProvider5FlatFlat(VAL_DATETIME);\n  // providers\n  private static final ImmutableRatesProvider RATE_PROVIDER =\n      RatesProviderFxDataSets.createProviderEURUSD(VAL_DATE);\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS =\n      FxVolatilitySmileDataSet.createVolatilitySmileProvider5(VAL_DATETIME);\n  // providers - after maturity\n  private static final ImmutableRatesProvider RATE_PROVIDER_AFTER =\n      RatesProviderFxDataSets.createProviderEURUSD(EXPIRY_DATE.plusDays(1));\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS_AFTER =\n      FxVolatilitySmileDataSet.createVolatilitySmileProvider5(EXPIRY_DATETIME.plusDays(1));\n\n  private static final double NOTIONAL = 100_000_000d;\n  private static final double LEVEL_LOW = 1.25;\n  private static final double LEVEL_HIGH = 1.6;\n  private static final SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier BARRIER_DKO =\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, LEVEL_LOW);\n  private static final SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier BARRIER_UKI =\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, LEVEL_HIGH);\n  private static final double REBATE_AMOUNT = 5_000_000d; // large rebate for testing\n  private static final CurrencyAmount REBATE = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, REBATE_AMOUNT);\n  private static final CurrencyAmount REBATE_BASE = CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, REBATE_AMOUNT);\n  private static final double STRIKE_RATE_HIGH = 1.45;\n  private static final double STRIKE_RATE_LOW = 1.35;\n  // call\n  private static final CurrencyAmount EUR_AMOUNT_REC = CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, NOTIONAL);\n  private static final CurrencyAmount USD_AMOUNT_PAY = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -NOTIONAL * STRIKE_RATE_LOW);\n  private static final ResolvedFxSingle FX_PRODUCT = ResolvedFxSingle.of(EUR_AMOUNT_REC, USD_AMOUNT_PAY, PAY_DATE);\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOption CALL = ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n      .longShort(LongShort.LONG)\n      .expiry(EXPIRY_DATETIME)\n      .underlying(FX_PRODUCT)\n      .build();\n  private static final CurrencyAmount EUR_AMOUNT_PAY = CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, -NOTIONAL);\n  private static final CurrencyAmount USD_AMOUNT_REC = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, NOTIONAL * STRIKE_RATE_HIGH);\n  private static final ResolvedFxSingle FX_PRODUCT_INV = ResolvedFxSingle.of(EUR_AMOUNT_PAY, USD_AMOUNT_REC, PAY_DATE);\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOption PUT = ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n      .longShort(LongShort.SHORT)\n      .expiry(EXPIRY_DATETIME)\n      .underlying(FX_PRODUCT_INV)\n      .build();\n  private static final ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption CALL_DKO =\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, BARRIER_DKO);\n  private static final ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption CALL_UKI_C =\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, BARRIER_UKI, REBATE);\n  // pricers and pre-calibration\n  private static final ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer PRICER_39 =\n      new ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer(39);\n  private static final RecombiningTrinomialTreeData DATA_39 =\n      PRICER_39.getCalibrator().calibrateTrinomialTree(CALL, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n  private static final ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer TRADE_PRICER_39 =\n      new ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer(PRICER_39, DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  private static final ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer PRICER_70 =\n      new ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer(70);\n  private static final RecombiningTrinomialTreeData DATA_70_FLAT =\n      PRICER_70.getCalibrator().calibrateTrinomialTree(CALL, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n  private static final BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer BLACK_PRICER = BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n  private static final BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer VANILLA_PRICER = BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_black() {\n    double tol = 1.0e-2;\n    for (int i = 0; i < 11; ++i) {\n      // up barrier\n      double lowerBarrier = 1.1 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dko);\n      double priceDkoBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionDko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceDko = PRICER_70.price(optionDko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceDko, priceDkoBlack, tol);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dki);\n      double priceDkiBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionDki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceDki = PRICER_70.price(optionDki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceDki, priceDkiBlack, tol);\n      // down barrier\n      double higherBarrier = 1.45 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uko);\n      double priceUkoBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionUko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceUko = PRICER_70.price(optionUko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceUko, priceUkoBlack, tol);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uki);\n      double priceUkiBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionUki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceUki = PRICER_70.price(optionUki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceUki, priceUkiBlack, tol);\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_black_currencyExposure() {\n    double tol = 7.0e-2; // large tol due to approximated delta\n    for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {\n      // up barrier\n      double lowerBarrier = 1.1 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dko, REBATE_BASE);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceDkoBlack = BLACK_PRICER.currencyExposure(optionDko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceDko =\n          PRICER_70.currencyExposure(optionDko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertThat(ceDko.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceDkoBlack.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n      assertThat(ceDko.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceDkoBlack.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dki, REBATE);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceDkiBlack = BLACK_PRICER.currencyExposure(optionDki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceDki =\n          PRICER_70.currencyExposure(optionDki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertThat(ceDki.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceDkiBlack.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n      assertThat(ceDki.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceDkiBlack.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n      // down barrier\n      double higherBarrier = 1.45 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uko, REBATE);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceUkoBlack = BLACK_PRICER.currencyExposure(optionUko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceUko =\n          PRICER_70.currencyExposure(optionUko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertThat(ceUko.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceUkoBlack.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n      assertThat(ceUko.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceUkoBlack.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uki, REBATE_BASE);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceUkiBlack = BLACK_PRICER.currencyExposure(optionUki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount ceUki =\n          PRICER_70.currencyExposure(optionUki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertThat(ceUki.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceUkiBlack.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n      assertThat(ceUki.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(ceUkiBlack.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * tol));\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_black_rebate() {\n    double tol = 1.5e-2;\n    for (int i = 0; i < 11; ++i) {\n      // up barrier\n      double lowerBarrier = 1.1 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, dko, REBATE_BASE);\n      double priceDkoBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionDko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceDko = PRICER_70.price(optionDko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceDko, priceDkoBlack, tol);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, dki, REBATE_BASE);\n      double priceDkiBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionDki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceDki = PRICER_70.price(optionDki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceDki, priceDkiBlack, tol);\n      // down barrier\n      double higherBarrier = 1.45 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, uko, REBATE);\n      double priceUkoBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionUko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceUko = PRICER_70.price(optionUko, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceUko, priceUkoBlack, tol);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, uki, REBATE);\n      double priceUkiBlack = BLACK_PRICER.price(optionUki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT);\n      double priceUki = PRICER_70.price(optionUki, RATE_PROVIDER_FLAT, VOLS_FLAT, DATA_70_FLAT);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceUki, priceUkiBlack, tol);\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_monotonicity() {\n    double priceDkoPrev = 100d;\n    double priceDkiPrev = 0d;\n    double priceUkoPrev = 0d;\n    double priceUkiPrev = 100d;\n    for (int i = 0; i < 50; ++i) {\n      // up barrier\n      double lowerBarrier = 1.1 + 0.006 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dko);\n      double priceDko = PRICER_39.price(optionDko, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionDki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dki);\n      double priceDki = PRICER_39.price(optionDki, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      // down barrier\n      double higherBarrier = 1.4 + 0.006 * (i + 1);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uko);\n      double priceUko = PRICER_39.price(optionUko, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption optionUki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uki);\n      double priceUki = PRICER_39.price(optionUki, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      assertThat(priceDkoPrev > priceDko).isTrue();\n      assertThat(priceDkiPrev < priceDki).isTrue();\n      assertThat(priceUkoPrev < priceUko).isTrue();\n      assertThat(priceUkiPrev > priceUki).isTrue();\n      priceDkoPrev = priceDko;\n      priceDkiPrev = priceDki;\n      priceUkoPrev = priceUko;\n      priceUkiPrev = priceUki;\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_inOutParity() {\n    double tol = 1.0e-2;\n    double callPrice = VANILLA_PRICER.price(CALL, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    double putPrice = VANILLA_PRICER.price(PUT, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    for (int i = 0; i < 11; ++i) {\n      // up barrier\n      double lowerBarrier = 1.1 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption callDko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dko);\n      double priceCallDko = PRICER_39.price(callDko, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption putDko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, dko);\n      double pricePutDko = PRICER_39.price(putDko, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption callDki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dki);\n      double priceCallDki = PRICER_39.price(callDki, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption putDki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, dki);\n      double pricePutDki = PRICER_39.price(putDki, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceCallDko + priceCallDki, callPrice, tol);\n      assertEqualsRelative(pricePutDko + pricePutDki, putPrice, tol);\n      // down barrier\n      double higherBarrier = 1.45 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption callUko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uko);\n      double priceCallUko = PRICER_39.price(callUko, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption putUko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, uko);\n      double pricePutUko = PRICER_39.price(putUko, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier uki =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.UP, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, higherBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption callUki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, uki);\n      double priceCallUki = PRICER_39.price(callUki, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption putUki = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(PUT, uki);\n      double pricePutUki = PRICER_39.price(putUki, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39);\n      assertEqualsRelative(priceCallUko + priceCallUki, callPrice, tol);\n      assertEqualsRelative(pricePutUko + pricePutUki, putPrice, tol);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValueSensitivityRates() {\n    ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer pricer =\n        new ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer(21);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities computed =\n        pricer.presentValueSensitivityRates(CALL_UKI_C, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    RatesFiniteDifferenceSensitivityCalculator calc = new RatesFiniteDifferenceSensitivityCalculator(1.0e-5);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities expected =\n        calc.sensitivity(RATE_PROVIDER, p -> pricer.presentValue(CALL_UKI_C, p, VOLS));\n    assertThat(computed.equalWithTolerance(expected, 1.0e-13)).isTrue();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_withData() {\n    ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer pricer =\n        new ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer(5);\n    RecombiningTrinomialTreeData data =\n        pricer.getCalibrator().calibrateTrinomialTree(CALL_DKO.getUnderlyingOption(), RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    double price = pricer.price(CALL_UKI_C, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    double priceWithData = pricer.price(CALL_UKI_C, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, data);\n    assertThat(price).isEqualTo(priceWithData);\n    CurrencyAmount pv = pricer.presentValue(CALL_DKO, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    CurrencyAmount pvWithData = pricer.presentValue(CALL_DKO, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, data);\n    assertThat(pv).isEqualTo(pvWithData);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount ce = pricer.currencyExposure(CALL_UKI_C, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount ceWithData = pricer.currencyExposure(CALL_UKI_C, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, data);\n    assertThat(ce).isEqualTo(ceWithData);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_expired_calibration() {\n    assertThatIllegalArgumentException()\n        .isThrownBy(() -> PRICER_39.getCalibrator().calibrateTrinomialTree(CALL_DKO.getUnderlyingOption(),\n        RATE_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER));\n    // pricing also fails because trinomial data can not be obtained\n    assertThatIllegalArgumentException()\n        .isThrownBy(() -> PRICER_39.price(CALL_DKO, RATE_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER));\n    assertThatIllegalArgumentException()\n        .isThrownBy(() -> PRICER_39.presentValue(CALL_DKO, RATE_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER));\n    assertThatIllegalArgumentException()\n        .isThrownBy(() -> PRICER_39.currencyExposure(CALL_DKO, RATE_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_dataMismatch() {\n    assertThatIllegalArgumentException()\n        .isThrownBy(() -> PRICER_70.presentValueSensitivityRates(\n        CALL_DKO, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS, DATA_39));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_tradePricer() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < 11; ++i) {\n      // up barrier\n      double lowerBarrier = 1.1 + 0.025 * i;\n      SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier dko =\n          SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, lowerBarrier);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption callDko = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.of(CALL, dko);\n      ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOptionTrade callTrade = ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n          .product(callDko)\n          .premium(Payment.of(EUR, 0, VAL_DATE))\n          .build();\n\n      CurrencyAmount pvProduct = PRICER_39.presentValue(callDko, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount pvTrade = TRADE_PRICER_39.presentValue(callTrade, RATE_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      assertThat(pvTrade.getAmount(USD)).isEqualTo(pvProduct);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  private void assertEqualsRelative(double computed, double expected, double relTol) {\n    assertThat(computed).isCloseTo(expected, offset(Math.max(1d, Math.abs(expected)) * relTol));\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2015 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.EUR;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.USD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_ACT_ISDA;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort.LONG;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort.SHORT;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\nimport static org.assertj.core.data.Offset.offset;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.function.Function;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.DoubleArrayMath;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleMatrix;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.CurveName;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.interpolator.CurveExtrapolator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.interpolator.CurveExtrapolators;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.interpolator.CurveInterpolator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.interpolator.CurveInterpolators;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.math.impl.linearalgebra.SVDecompositionCommons;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.math.linearalgebra.DecompositionResult;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fx.RatesProviderFxDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.impl.option.BlackFormulaRepository;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.ImmutableRatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.RatesFiniteDifferenceSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.ResolvedFxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Test {@link VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer}.\n */\npublic class VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest {\n\n  private static final ZoneId ZONE = ZoneId.of(\"Z\");\n  private static final ZonedDateTime VAL_DATETIME = ZonedDateTime.of(2011, 6, 13, 13, 10, 0, 0, ZONE);\n  private static final LocalDate VAL_DATE = VAL_DATETIME.toLocalDate();\n  private static final ZonedDateTime EXPIRY = ZonedDateTime.of(2012, 12, 13, 10, 0, 0, 0, ZONE);\n  private static final LocalDate PAY = LocalDate.of(2012, 12, 17);\n  private static final ZonedDateTime AFTER = ZonedDateTime.of(2012, 12, 24, 10, 0, 0, 0, ZONE);\n  private static final ImmutableRatesProvider RATES_PROVIDER =\n      RatesProviderFxDataSets.createProviderEurUsdActActIsda(VAL_DATE);\n  private static final ImmutableRatesProvider RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER =\n      RatesProviderFxDataSets.createProviderEurUsdActActIsda(AFTER.toLocalDate());\n\n  private static final DoubleArray TIME_TO_EXPIRY = DoubleArray.of(0.0001, 0.25205479452054796, 0.5013698630136987,\n      1.0015120892282356, 2.0, 5.001512089228235);\n  private static final DoubleArray ATM = DoubleArray.of(0.11, 0.115, 0.12, 0.12, 0.125, 0.13);\n  private static final DoubleArray DELTA = DoubleArray.of(0.25);\n  private static final DoubleMatrix RISK_REVERSAL = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {0.015}, {0.020}, {0.025}, {0.03}, {0.025}, {0.030}});\n  private static final DoubleMatrix STRANGLE = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {0.002}, {0.003}, {0.004}, {0.0045}, {0.0045}, {0.0045}});\n  private static final CurveInterpolator INTERP_STRIKE = CurveInterpolators.DOUBLE_QUADRATIC;\n  private static final CurveExtrapolator EXTRAP_STRIKE = CurveExtrapolators.LINEAR;\n  private static final InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure SMILE_TERM =\n      InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure.of(\n          TIME_TO_EXPIRY, DELTA, ATM, RISK_REVERSAL, STRANGLE, ACT_ACT_ISDA, INTERP_STRIKE, EXTRAP_STRIKE, EXTRAP_STRIKE);\n  private static final CurrencyPair CURRENCY_PAIR = CurrencyPair.of(EUR, USD);\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS =\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities.of(FxOptionVolatilitiesName.of(\"Test\"), CURRENCY_PAIR, VAL_DATETIME, SMILE_TERM);\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS_AFTER =\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities.of(FxOptionVolatilitiesName.of(\"Test\"), CURRENCY_PAIR, AFTER, SMILE_TERM);\n\n  private static final int NB_STRIKES = 11;\n  private static final double STRIKE_MIN = 1.00;\n  private static final double STRIKE_RANGE = 0.80;\n  private static final double NOTIONAL = 100_000_000;\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOption[] CALLS = new ResolvedFxEuropeanOption[NB_STRIKES];\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOption[] PUTS = new ResolvedFxEuropeanOption[NB_STRIKES];\n  private static final ResolvedFxSingle[] UNDERLYING = new ResolvedFxSingle[NB_STRIKES];\n  static {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      double strike = STRIKE_MIN + i * STRIKE_RANGE / (NB_STRIKES - 1d);\n      CurrencyAmount eurAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, NOTIONAL);\n      CurrencyAmount usdAmount = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -NOTIONAL * strike);\n      UNDERLYING[i] = ResolvedFxSingle.of(eurAmount, usdAmount, PAY);\n      CALLS[i] = ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n          .longShort(LONG)\n          .expiry(EXPIRY)\n          .underlying(UNDERLYING[i])\n          .build();\n      PUTS[i] = ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.builder()\n          .longShort(SHORT)\n          .expiry(EXPIRY)\n          .underlying(UNDERLYING[i].inverse())\n          .build();\n    }\n  }\n\n  private static final double TOL = 1.0e-13;\n  private static final double FD_EPS = 1.0e-7;\n  private static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer PRICER = VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n  private static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer TRADE_PRICER = VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n  private static final DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer FX_PRICER = DiscountingFxSingleProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n  private static final RatesFiniteDifferenceSensitivityCalculator FD_CAL =\n      new RatesFiniteDifferenceSensitivityCalculator(FD_EPS);\n  private static final SVDecompositionCommons SVD = new SVDecompositionCommons();\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_price_presentValue() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption call = CALLS[i];\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade callTrade = ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n          .product(call)\n          .premium(Payment.of(EUR, 0, VAL_DATE))\n          .build();\n      double computedPriceCall = PRICER.price(call, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      CurrencyAmount computedCall = PRICER.presentValue(call, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      double timeToExpiry = VOLS.relativeTime(EXPIRY);\n      FxRate forward = FX_PRICER.forwardFxRate(UNDERLYING[i], RATES_PROVIDER);\n      double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(CURRENCY_PAIR);\n      double strikeRate = call.getStrike();\n      SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = VOLS.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n      double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n      double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n      double df = RATES_PROVIDER.discountFactor(USD, PAY);\n      double[] weights = weights(forwardRate, strikeRate, strikes, timeToExpiry, vols[1]);\n      double expectedPriceCall = BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, vols[1], true);\n      for (int j = 0; j < 3; ++j) {\n        expectedPriceCall += weights[j] * (\n            BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[j], timeToExpiry, vols[j], true)\n            - BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strikes[j], timeToExpiry, vols[1], true));\n      }\n      expectedPriceCall *= df;\n      assertThat(computedPriceCall).isCloseTo(expectedPriceCall, offset(TOL));\n      assertThat(computedCall.getAmount()).isCloseTo(expectedPriceCall * NOTIONAL, offset(TOL * NOTIONAL));\n      // test against trade pricer\n      assertThat(computedCall).isEqualTo(TRADE_PRICER.presentValue(callTrade, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS).getAmount(USD));\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_price_presentValue_afterExpiry() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption call = CALLS[i];\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade callTrade = ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n          .product(call)\n          .premium(Payment.of(EUR, 0, VOLS_AFTER.getValuationDate()))\n          .build();\n      double computedPriceCall = PRICER.price(call, RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      CurrencyAmount computedCall = PRICER.presentValue(call, RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedPriceCall).isCloseTo(0d, offset(TOL));\n      assertThat(computedCall.getAmount()).isCloseTo(0d, offset(TOL));\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption put = PUTS[i];\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade putTrade = ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n          .product(put)\n          .premium(Payment.of(EUR, 0, VOLS_AFTER.getValuationDate()))\n          .build();\n      double computedPricePut = PRICER.price(put, RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      CurrencyAmount computedPut = PRICER.presentValue(put, RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedPricePut).isCloseTo(0d, offset(TOL));\n      assertThat(computedPut.getAmount()).isCloseTo(0d, offset(TOL));\n      // test against trade pricer\n      assertThat(computedCall).isEqualTo(TRADE_PRICER.presentValue(callTrade, RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER).getAmount(USD));\n      assertThat(computedPut).isEqualTo(TRADE_PRICER.presentValue(putTrade, RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER).getAmount(USD));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValueSensitivity() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOption option = CALLS[i];\n      PointSensitivityBuilder point = PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(option, RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      CurrencyParameterSensitivities sensiComputed = RATES_PROVIDER.parameterSensitivity(point.build());\n      double timeToExpiry = VOLS.relativeTime(EXPIRY);\n      double forwardRate = FX_PRICER.forwardFxRate(UNDERLYING[i], RATES_PROVIDER).fxRate(CURRENCY_PAIR);\n      double strikeRate = option.getStrike();\n      SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = VOLS.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n      double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n      double df = RATES_PROVIDER.discountFactor(USD, PAY);\n      CurrencyParameterSensitivities sensiExpected =\n          FD_CAL.sensitivity(RATES_PROVIDER, p -> PRICER.presentValue(option, p, VOLS));\n      CurrencyParameterSensitivities sensiRes = FD_CAL.sensitivity(RATES_PROVIDER,\n          new Function<ImmutableRatesProvider, CurrencyAmount>() {\n            @Override\n            public CurrencyAmount apply(ImmutableRatesProvider p) {\n              double fwd = FX_PRICER.forwardFxRate(option.getUnderlying(), p).fxRate(CURRENCY_PAIR);\n              double[] strs = smileAtTime.strike(fwd).toArray();\n              double[] wghts = weights(fwd, strikeRate, strs, timeToExpiry, vols[1]);\n              double res = 0d;\n              for (int j = 0; j < 3; ++j) {\n                res += wghts[j] * (BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strs[j], timeToExpiry, vols[j], true)\n                    - BlackFormulaRepository.price(forwardRate, strs[j], timeToExpiry, vols[1], true));\n              }\n              return CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -res * df * NOTIONAL);\n            }\n          });\n      assertThat(sensiComputed.equalWithTolerance(sensiExpected.combinedWith(sensiRes), FD_EPS * NOTIONAL * 10d)).isTrue();\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValueSensitivity_afterExpiry() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      PointSensitivityBuilder computedCall =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedCall).isEqualTo(PointSensitivityBuilder.none());\n      PointSensitivityBuilder computedPut =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedPut).isEqualTo(PointSensitivityBuilder.none());\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValueSensitivityVolatility() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      PointSensitivities computedCall =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS).build();\n      double timeToExpiry = VOLS.relativeTime(EXPIRY);\n      FxRate forward = FX_PRICER.forwardFxRate(UNDERLYING[i], RATES_PROVIDER);\n      double forwardRate = forward.fxRate(CURRENCY_PAIR);\n      double strikeRate = CALLS[i].getStrike();\n      SmileDeltaParameters smileAtTime = VOLS.getSmile().smileForExpiry(timeToExpiry);\n      double[] strikes = smileAtTime.strike(forwardRate).toArray();\n      double[] vols = smileAtTime.getVolatility().toArray();\n      double df = RATES_PROVIDER.discountFactor(USD, PAY);\n      double[] weights = weights(forwardRate, strikeRate, strikes, timeToExpiry, vols[1]);\n      double[] vegas = new double[3];\n      vegas[2] = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikeRate, timeToExpiry, vols[1]) * df * NOTIONAL;\n      for (int j = 0; j < 3; j += 2) {\n        vegas[2] -= weights[j] * NOTIONAL * df *\n            BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[j], timeToExpiry, vols[1]);\n      }\n      vegas[0] = weights[0] * NOTIONAL * df *\n          BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[0], timeToExpiry, vols[0]);\n      vegas[1] = weights[2] * NOTIONAL * df *\n          BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forwardRate, strikes[2], timeToExpiry, vols[2]);\n      double[] expStrikes = new double[] {strikes[0], strikes[2], strikes[1] };\n      for (int j = 0; j < 3; ++j) {\n        FxOptionSensitivity sensi = (FxOptionSensitivity) computedCall.getSensitivities().get(j);\n        assertThat(sensi.getSensitivity()).isCloseTo(vegas[j], offset(TOL * NOTIONAL));\n        assertThat(sensi.getStrike()).isCloseTo(expStrikes[j], offset(TOL));\n        assertThat(sensi.getForward()).isCloseTo(forwardRate, offset(TOL));\n        assertThat(sensi.getCurrency()).isEqualTo(USD);\n        assertThat(sensi.getCurrencyPair()).isEqualTo(CURRENCY_PAIR);\n        assertThat(sensi.getExpiry()).isEqualTo(timeToExpiry);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValueSensitivityVolatility_afterExpiry() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      PointSensitivityBuilder computedCall =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedCall).isEqualTo(PointSensitivityBuilder.none());\n      PointSensitivityBuilder computedPut =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedPut).isEqualTo(PointSensitivityBuilder.none());\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_currencyExposure() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      CurrencyAmount pvCall = PRICER.presentValue(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiCall = PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount computedCall = PRICER.currencyExposure(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount expectedCall = RATES_PROVIDER.currencyExposure(pvSensiCall.build()).plus(pvCall);\n      assertThat(computedCall.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(expectedCall.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n      assertThat(computedCall.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(expectedCall.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n      CurrencyAmount pvPut = PRICER.presentValue(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiPut = PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount computedPut = PRICER.currencyExposure(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPut = RATES_PROVIDER.currencyExposure(pvSensiPut.build()).plus(pvPut);\n      assertThat(computedPut.getAmount(EUR).getAmount()).isCloseTo(expectedPut.getAmount(EUR).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n      assertThat(computedPut.getAmount(USD).getAmount()).isCloseTo(expectedPut.getAmount(USD).getAmount(), offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_currencyExposure_atExpiry() {\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      MultiCurrencyAmount computedCall = PRICER.currencyExposure(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedCall).isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyAmount.empty());\n      MultiCurrencyAmount computedPut = PRICER.currencyExposure(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER_AFTER, VOLS_AFTER);\n      assertThat(computedPut).isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyAmount.empty());\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_putCallParity() {\n    double df = RATES_PROVIDER.discountFactor(USD, PAY);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi = RATES_PROVIDER.discountFactors(USD).zeroRatePointSensitivity(PAY);\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      CurrencyAmount pvCall = PRICER.presentValue(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiCall =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiVolCall =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      CurrencyAmount pvPut = PRICER.presentValue(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiPut =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiVolPut =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(PUTS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      double forward = FX_PRICER.forwardFxRate(UNDERLYING[i], RATES_PROVIDER).fxRate(CURRENCY_PAIR);\n      PointSensitivityBuilder forwardSensi = FX_PRICER.forwardFxRatePointSensitivity(UNDERLYING[i], RATES_PROVIDER);\n      double strike = CALLS[i].getStrike();\n      assertThat(pvCall.getAmount() + pvPut.getAmount()).isCloseTo(df * (forward - strike) * NOTIONAL, offset(TOL * NOTIONAL));\n      assertThat(pvSensiCall.combinedWith(pvSensiPut).build().normalized().equalWithTolerance(\n          dfSensi.multipliedBy((forward - strike) * NOTIONAL)\n              .combinedWith(forwardSensi.multipliedBy(df * NOTIONAL)).build().normalized(),\n          NOTIONAL * TOL)).isTrue();\n      DoubleArray sensiVol = VOLS.parameterSensitivity(\n          pvSensiVolCall.combinedWith(pvSensiVolPut).build()).getSensitivities().get(0).getSensitivity();\n      assertThat(DoubleArrayMath.fuzzyEquals(sensiVol.toArray(), new double[sensiVol.size()], NOTIONAL * TOL)).isTrue();\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void regression_test() {\n    double[] expected = new double[] {\n        3.860405407112769E7, 3.0897699603079587E7, 2.3542824458812844E7, 1.6993448607300103E7, 1.1705393621236656E7,\n        7865881.8260216825, 5312495.846331886, 3680367.6766224853, 2607701.430445888, 1849818.297903138, 1282881.9812227674};\n    double[][][] sensiExpected = new double[][][] {\n        {{0d, 0d, -1.016834993607875E8, -1.0687281893573801E8, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 7.321670893786977E7, 7.695325324735151E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -1.0021953885887374E8, -1.0533414661787288E8, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 7.743544635059586E7, 8.13872898657015E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -9.430418338541561E7, -9.911690666813123E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 7.69436064730077E7, 8.087034941308834E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -8.284596766339977E7, -8.707393192902757E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 7.031492781003796E7, 7.3903382511043E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -6.764082328040574E7, -7.109280762910862E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 5.900921722111582E7, 6.2020695857797466E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -5.2035331262043096E7, -5.4690904337366335E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 4.623499720852033E7, 4.859455581508104E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -3.862682913929568E7, -4.059811220715709E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 3.470937255296122E7, 3.64807319923551E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -2.8260648102423556E7, -2.970290309286549E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 2.554672963322189E7, 2.6850482405254934E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -2.0537629799871795E7, -2.1585747980437294E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 1.8614699892839946E7, 1.9564683195371673E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -1.4728101851302534E7, -1.5479736361515924E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 1.3364038126029937E7, 1.404605895619165E7, 0d}},\n        {{0d, 0d, -1.0288414551608022E7, -1.0813473891259879E7, 0d},\n            {0d, 0d, 9342412.029968219, 9819193.040939828, 0d}}};\n    double[][] sensiVolExpected = new double[][] {\n        {-5.026579681006058E7, 1.8086314260527827E7, 3.7857814067085885E7},\n        {-8.042768121510313E7, 2.6917736783424407E7, 6.828128237717555E7},\n        {-7.799249393870309E7, 2.3424689020542752E7, 8.3630726080757E7},\n        {-3.164036884467365E7, 7924431.550466087, 6.934450937795731E7},\n        {3.014881927958022E7, -5158819.178957329, 3.45255051012762E7},\n        {6.557093411024924E7, -1634314.6028730718, 2572569.1856012754},\n        {5.660208041880186E7, 1.8970507395428047E7, -1.03548720023163E7},\n        {1.685473267352155E7, 4.502558010977008E7, -4691785.767471665},\n        {-2.724527388461766E7, 6.375255786622942E7, 9031557.200953793},\n        {-5.657559310469577E7, 6.925498619398344E7, 2.0671226006236725E7},\n        {-6.6067357100129634E7, 6.307938934530911E7, 2.5692820222277485E7}};\n    CurveName eurName = RatesProviderFxDataSets.getCurveName(EUR);\n    CurveName usdName = RatesProviderFxDataSets.getCurveName(USD);\n    for (int i = 0; i < NB_STRIKES; ++i) {\n      // pv\n      CurrencyAmount computed = PRICER.presentValue(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      assertThat(computed.getAmount()).isCloseTo(expected[i], offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n      // curve sensitivity\n      PointSensitivityBuilder point = PRICER.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS);\n      CurrencyParameterSensitivities sensiComputed = RATES_PROVIDER.parameterSensitivity(point.build());\n      assertThat(DoubleArrayMath.fuzzyEquals(\n          sensiComputed.getSensitivity(eurName, USD).getSensitivity().toArray(),\n          sensiExpected[i][0],\n          NOTIONAL * TOL)).isTrue();\n      assertThat(DoubleArrayMath.fuzzyEquals(\n          sensiComputed.getSensitivity(usdName, USD).getSensitivity().toArray(),\n          sensiExpected[i][1],\n          NOTIONAL * TOL)).isTrue();\n      // vol sensitivity\n      PointSensitivities pointVol =\n          PRICER.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(CALLS[i], RATES_PROVIDER, VOLS).build();\n      assertThat(pointVol.getSensitivities().get(0).getSensitivity()).isCloseTo(sensiVolExpected[i][2], offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n      assertThat(pointVol.getSensitivities().get(1).getSensitivity()).isCloseTo(sensiVolExpected[i][1], offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n      assertThat(pointVol.getSensitivities().get(2).getSensitivity()).isCloseTo(sensiVolExpected[i][0], offset(NOTIONAL * TOL));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  private double[] weights(double forward, double strike, double[] strikes, double timeToExpiry, double atmVol) {\n    double[][] mat = new double[3][3];\n    double[] vec = new double[3];\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {\n      mat[0][i] = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, atmVol);\n      mat[1][i] = BlackFormulaRepository.vanna(forward, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, atmVol);\n      mat[2][i] = BlackFormulaRepository.volga(forward, strikes[i], timeToExpiry, atmVol);\n    }\n    vec[0] = BlackFormulaRepository.vega(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, atmVol);\n    vec[1] = BlackFormulaRepository.vanna(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, atmVol);\n    vec[2] = BlackFormulaRepository.volga(forward, strike, timeToExpiry, atmVol);\n    DecompositionResult res = SVD.apply(DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(mat));\n    return res.solve(vec);\n  }\n\n}\n",

        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;",

{
  "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX vanilla option trades with a Vanna-Volga method.\n * <p>\n * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \n * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n */\npublic class VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * \n   * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}\n   * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n   */\n  public VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n    this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n    this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade is the value on the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct, pvPremium);\n  }\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java",
    "numLines": 80,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 165
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Input
{

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX vanilla option trades with a Vanna-Volga method.\n * <p>\n * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \n * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n */\npublic class VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * \n   * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}\n   * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n   */\n  public VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n    this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n    this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade is the value on the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct, pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of the present value to\n   * the underlying curves.\n   * <p>\n   * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n        productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\n    return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the current of the FX vanilla option trade.",
    "filePath": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java",
    "numLines": 150,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 165
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for FX vanilla option trades with a Vanna-Volga method.\n * <p>\n * The volatilities are expressed using {@code BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities}. \n * Each smile of the term structure consists of 3 data points, where the middle point corresponds to ATM volatility.\n */\npublic class VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer DEFAULT = new VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.DEFAULT,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link Payment}.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * \n   * @param productPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOption}\n   * @param paymentPricer  the pricer for {@link Payment}\n   */\n  public VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer(\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer productPricer,\n      DiscountingPaymentPricer paymentPricer) {\n    this.productPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(productPricer, \"productPricer\");\n    this.paymentPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(paymentPricer, \"paymentPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade is the value on the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value of the trade\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(product, ratesProvider, volatilities);\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    return MultiCurrencyAmount.of(pvProduct, pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of the present value to\n   * the underlying curves.\n   * <p>\n   * The volatility is fixed in this sensitivity computation.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value curve sensitivity of the trade\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsProduct =\n        productPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    PointSensitivities pvcsPremium = paymentPricer.presentValueSensitivity(premium, ratesProvider).build();\n    return pvcsProduct.combinedWith(pvcsPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Computes the present value sensitivity to the black volatility used in the pricing.\n   * <p>\n   * The result is a single sensitivity to the volatility used.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the currency exposure of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param volatilities  the Black volatility provider\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities volatilities) {\n\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    CurrencyAmount pvPremium = paymentPricer.presentValue(premium, ratesProvider);\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    return productPricer.currencyExposure(product, ratesProvider, volatilities).plus(pvPremium);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the current of the FX vanilla option trade.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the option trade\n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @return the current cash amount\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, LocalDate valuationDate) {\n    Payment premium = trade.getPremium();\n    if (premium.getDate().equals(valuationDate)) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), premium.getAmount());\n    }\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(premium.getCurrency(), 0d);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;",
        " ",
        " /**"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 16,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 16
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}
99. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/add_missing_imports.sh << 'EOF'\n#!/bin/bash\n\ncd /workspace\n\n# For each pricer file that uses ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade, ensure the import exists\nfor file in $(grep -l \"ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\" modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/*.java | grep -v \"\\.swp\"); do\n  if ! grep -q \"import.*ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\" \"$file\"; then\n    # Add the import after the other ResolvedFx imports\n    sed -i '/import.*ResolvedFx[a-zA-Z]*$/a import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;' \"$file\"\n  fi\ndone\n\necho \"Added missing imports\"\nEOF\nchmod +x /tmp/add_missing_imports.sh\nbash /tmp/add_missing_imports.sh\n"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "Added missing imports"
}

com.opengamma.strata.product.index.IborFutureTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFuturePosition;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.index.OvernightFutureTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.payment.BulletPaymentTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.SwapTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Factory methods for creating standard Strata components.\n * <p>\n * These components are suitable for performing calculations using the built-in asset classes,\n * market data types and pricers.\n * <p>\n * The market data factory can create market data values derived from other values.\n * For example it can create calibrated curves given market quotes.\n * However it cannot request market data from an external provider, such as Bloomberg,\n * or look up data from a data store, for example a time series database.\n * Instances of {@link CalculationRunner} are created directly using the static methods on the interface.\n */\npublic final class StandardComponents {\n\n  /**\n   * The standard calculation functions.\n   */\n  private static final CalculationFunctions STANDARD = CalculationFunctions.of(\n      new BulletPaymentTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new CdsTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new CdsIndexTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new FraTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new FxNdfTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new FxSingleTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new FxSwapTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new IborCapFloorTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new SecurityPositionCalculationFunction(),\n      new SecurityTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new SwapTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new SwaptionTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new CmsTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new TermDepositTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      new GenericSecurityPositionCalculationFunction(),\n      new GenericSecurityTradeCalculationFunction(),\n      BondFutureTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      BondFutureTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      BondFutureOptionTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      BondFutureOptionTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      CapitalIndexedBondTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      CapitalIndexedBondTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      DsfTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      DsfTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      FixedCouponBondTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      FixedCouponBondTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      BillTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      BillTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      IborFutureTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      IborFutureTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      OvernightFutureTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      OvernightFutureTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION,\n      IborFutureOptionTradeCalculationFunction.TRADE,\n      IborFutureOptionTradeCalculationFunction.POSITION);\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor.\n   */\n  private StandardComponents() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Returns a market data factory containing the standard set of market data functions.\n   * <p>\n   * This factory can create market data values from other market data. For example it\n   * can create calibrated curves given a set of market quotes for the points on the curve.\n   * <p>\n   * The set of functions are the ones provided by {@link #marketDataFunctions()}.\n   *\n   * @return a market data factory containing the standard set of market data functions\n   */\n  public static MarketDataFactory marketDataFactory() {\n    return marketDataFactory(ObservableDataProvider.none());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a market data factory containing the standard set of market data functions.\n   * <p>\n   * This factory can create market data values from other market data. For example it\n   * can create calibrated curves given a set of market quotes for the points on the curve.\n   * <p>\n   * The set of functions are the ones provided by {@link #marketDataFunctions()}.\n   *\n   * @param observableDataProvider  the provider of observable data\n   * @return a market data factory containing the standard set of market data functions\n   */\n  public static MarketDataFactory marketDataFactory(ObservableDataProvider observableDataProvider) {\n    return MarketDataFactory.of(observableDataProvider, TimeSeriesProvider.none(), marketDataFunctions());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the standard market data functions used to build market data values from other market data.\n   * <p>\n   * These include functions to build:\n   * <ul>\n   *  <li>Par rates from quotes\n   *  <li>Curve groups from par rates\n   *  <li>Curves from curve groups\n   *  <li>Discount factors and index rates from curves\n   *  <li>FX rates from quotes\n   *  <li>FX option volatilities from quotes\n   * </ul>\n   *\n   * @return the standard market data functions\n   */\n  public static List<MarketDataFunction<?, ?>> marketDataFunctions() {\n    return ImmutableList.of(\n        new CurveMarketDataFunction(),\n        new RatesCurveGroupMarketDataFunction(),\n        new RatesCurveInputsMarketDataFunction(),\n        new FxRateMarketDataFunction(),\n        new FxOptionVolatilitiesMarketDataFunction());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Returns the standard calculation functions.\n   * <p>\n   * These define how to calculate the standard measures for the standard asset classes.\n   * <p>\n   * The standard calculation functions require no further configuration and are designed to allow\n   * easy access to all built-in asset class coverage.\n   * The supported asset classes are:\n   * <ul>\n   *  <li>Bond future - {@link BondFutureTrade} and {@link BondFuturePosition}\n   *  <li>Bond future option - {@link BondFutureOptionTrade} and {@link BondFutureOptionPosition}\n   *  <li>Bullet Payment - {@link BulletPaymentTrade}\n   *  <li>Cap/floor (Ibor) - {@link IborCapFloorTrade}\n   *  <li>Capital Indexed bond - {@link CapitalIndexedBondTrade} and {@link CapitalIndexedBondPosition}\n   *  <li>Credit Default Swap - {@link CdsTrade}\n   *  <li>CDS Index - {@link CdsIndexTrade}\n   *  <li>Deliverable Swap Future - {@link DsfTrade} and {@link DsfPosition}\n   *  <li>Forward Rate Agreement - {@link FraTrade}\n   *  <li>Fixed coupon bond - {@link FixedCouponBondTrade} and {@link FixedCouponBondPosition}\n   *  <li>FX spot and FX forward - {@link FxSingleTrade}\n   *  <li>FX NDF - {@link FxNdfTrade}\n   *  <li>FX swap - {@link FxSwapTrade}\n   *  <li>FX vanilla option - {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}\n   *  <li>FX single barrier option - {@link FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade}\n   *  <li>Generic Security - {@link GenericSecurityTrade} and {@link GenericSecurityPosition}\n   *  <li>Rate Swap - {@link SwapTrade}\n   *  <li>Swaption - {@link SwaptionTrade}\n   *  <li>Security - {@link SecurityTrade} and {@link SecurityPosition}\n   *  <li>STIR Future (Ibor) - {@link IborFutureTrade} and {@link IborFuturePosition}\n   *  <li>STIR Future (Overnight Indices) - {@link OvernightFutureTrade} and {@link OvernightFuturePosition}\n   *  <li>STIR Future Option (Ibor) - {@link IborFutureOptionTrade} and {@link IborFutureOptionPosition}\n   *  <li>Term Deposit - {@link TermDepositTrade}\n   * </ul>\n   *\n   * @return calculation functions used to perform calculations\n   */\n  public static CalculationFunctions calculationFunctions() {\n    return STANDARD;\n  }\n\n}\n",

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>",
    "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java",
    "numLines": 35,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 376
  },

}
