{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n   */\n  private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * \n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n    this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> presentValue(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // present value for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  // point sensitivity\n  private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSens;\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      pointSens = vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates vega (present value volatility sensitivities) for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // vega for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\n      return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    } else {\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n      return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currencyExposure(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // currency exposure for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates delta for all scenarios\n  DoubleScenarioArray delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> delta(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // delta for one scenario\n  double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n          \"FX vanilla option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\");\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates current cash for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currentCash(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // current cash for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      LocalDate valuationDate,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    }\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

{

  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * This provides a high-level entry point for FX vanilla option pricing and risk measures.\n * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\n * <p>\n * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\n * typically work with {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}. Call\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxEuropeanOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\n * to convert {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade} to {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * <p>\n   * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\n   * \n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.calc = new FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value for a single set of market data.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value of the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates currency exposure across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates currency exposure for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates current cash across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the current cash, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currentCash(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates current cash for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the current cash\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currentCash(trade, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), method);\n  }\n\n}\n",

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java",
  "newString": "import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK;",
  "oldString": "import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionMethod.BLACK;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionMethod.BLACK;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Test {@link FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations}.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest {\n\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade RTRADE = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.RTRADE;\n  private static final RatesMarketDataLookup RATES_LOOKUP = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.RATES_LOOKUP;\n  private static final FxOptionMarketDataLookup FX_OPTION_LOOKUP = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.FX_OPTION_LOOKUP;\n  private static final BlackFxOptionVolatilities VOLS = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.VOLS;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValue() {\n    ScenarioMarketData md = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.marketDataView(md.scenario(0)).ratesProvider();\n    BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv = pricer.presentValue(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedCurrencyExposure = pricer.currencyExposure(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyAmount expectedCurrentCash = pricer.currentCash(RTRADE, provider.getValuationDate());\n\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.presentValue(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv)));\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.currencyExposure(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCurrencyExposure)));\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.currentCash(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(CurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCurrentCash)));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_pv01() {\n    ScenarioMarketData md = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.marketDataView(md.scenario(0)).ratesProvider();\n    BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    PointSensitivities pvPointSens = pricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities pvParamSens = provider.parameterSensitivity(pvPointSens);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv01Cal = pvParamSens.total().multipliedBy(1e-4);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities expectedPv01CalBucketed = pvParamSens.multipliedBy(1e-4);\n\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv01Cal)));\n    assertThat(\n        FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n            .isEqualTo(ScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv01CalBucketed)));\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "  */",
        " package com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;",
        " ",
        "-import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxVanillaOptionMethod.BLACK;",
        "+import static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK;",
        " import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;",
        " ",
        " import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 5,
      "oldLines": 7,
      "oldStart": 5
    }
  ],

}

{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Test {@link FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations}.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest {\n\n  private static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade RTRADE = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.RTRADE;\n  private static final RatesMarketDataLookup RATES_LOOKUP = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.RATES_LOOKUP;\n  private static final FxOptionMarketDataLookup FX_OPTION_LOOKUP = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.FX_OPTION_LOOKUP;\n  private static final BlackFxOptionVolatilities VOLS = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.VOLS;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_presentValue() {\n    ScenarioMarketData md = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.marketDataView(md.scenario(0)).ratesProvider();\n    BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv = pricer.presentValue(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedCurrencyExposure = pricer.currencyExposure(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyAmount expectedCurrentCash = pricer.currentCash(RTRADE, provider.getValuationDate());\n\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.presentValue(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv)));\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.currencyExposure(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCurrencyExposure)));\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.currentCash(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(CurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCurrentCash)));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_pv01() {\n    ScenarioMarketData md = FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.marketDataView(md.scenario(0)).ratesProvider();\n    BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    PointSensitivities pvPointSens = pricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities pvParamSens = provider.parameterSensitivity(pvPointSens);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv01Cal = pvParamSens.total().multipliedBy(1e-4);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities expectedPv01CalBucketed = pvParamSens.multipliedBy(1e-4);\n\n    assertThat(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n        .isEqualTo(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv01Cal)));\n    assertThat(\n        FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.DEFAULT.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(RTRADE, RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP, md, BLACK))\n            .isEqualTo(ScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv01CalBucketed)));\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.datasets.RatesProviderDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.EUR;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.USD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_360;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_365F;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort.SHORT;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZoneOffset;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleMatrix;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.FxRateId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.ConstantCurve;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.Curve;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.CurveId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.Curves;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.curve.TestMarketDataMap;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.datasets.RatesProviderDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilitiesName;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Test {@link FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction}.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest {\n\n  private static final ReferenceData REF_DATA = ReferenceData.standard();\n\n  private static final LocalDate VAL_DATE = RatesProviderDataSets.VAL_DATE_2014_01_22;\n  private static final ZoneId ZONE = ZoneId.of(\"Z\");\n  private static final LocalDate PAYMENT_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 5, 13);\n  private static final double NOTIONAL = 1.0e6;\n  private static final CurrencyAmount EUR_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, NOTIONAL);\n  private static final CurrencyAmount USD_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -NOTIONAL * 1.1d);\n  private static final FxSingle FX_PRODUCT = FxSingle.of(EUR_AMOUNT, USD_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_DATE);\n  private static final FxEuropeanOption OPTION_PRODUCT = FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n      .longShort(SHORT)\n      .expiryDate(LocalDate.of(2014, 5, 9))\n      .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(13, 10))\n      .expiryZone(ZONE)\n      .underlying(FX_PRODUCT)\n      .build();\n  private static final TradeInfo TRADE_INFO = TradeInfo.builder().tradeDate(VAL_DATE).build();\n  private static final LocalDate CASH_SETTLE_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 1, 25);\n  private static final AdjustablePayment PREMIUM = AdjustablePayment.of(EUR, NOTIONAL * 0.027, CASH_SETTLE_DATE);\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionTrade TRADE = FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n      .premium(PREMIUM)\n      .product(OPTION_PRODUCT)\n      .info(TRADE_INFO)\n      .build();\n  public static final ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade RTRADE = TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA);\n\n  private static final CurveId DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID = CurveId.of(\"Default\", \"Discount-EUR\");\n  private static final CurveId DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID = CurveId.of(\"Default\", \"Discount-USD\");\n  static final RatesMarketDataLookup RATES_LOOKUP = RatesMarketDataLookup.of(\n      ImmutableMap.of(EUR, DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID, USD, DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID),\n      ImmutableMap.of());\n\n  private static final DoubleArray TIME_TO_EXPIRY = DoubleArray.of(0.01, 0.252, 0.501, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0);\n  private static final DoubleArray ATM = DoubleArray.of(0.175, 0.185, 0.18, 0.17, 0.16, 0.16);\n  private static final DoubleArray DELTA = DoubleArray.of(0.10, 0.25);\n  private static final DoubleMatrix RISK_REVERSAL = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {-0.010, -0.0050}, {-0.011, -0.0060}, {-0.012, -0.0070},\n      {-0.013, -0.0080}, {-0.014, -0.0090}, {-0.014, -0.0090}});\n  private static final DoubleMatrix STRANGLE = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {0.0300, 0.0100}, {0.0310, 0.0110}, {0.0320, 0.0120},\n      {0.0330, 0.0130}, {0.0340, 0.0140}, {0.0340, 0.0140}});\n  private static final InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure SMILE_TERM =\n      InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure.of(TIME_TO_EXPIRY, DELTA, ATM, RISK_REVERSAL, STRANGLE, ACT_365F);\n  private static final CurrencyPair CURRENCY_PAIR = CurrencyPair.of(EUR, USD);\n  public static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS =\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities.of(\n          FxOptionVolatilitiesName.of(\"Test\"),\n          CURRENCY_PAIR,\n          VAL_DATE.atStartOfDay(ZoneOffset.UTC),\n          SMILE_TERM);\n\n  private static final FxOptionVolatilitiesId VOL_ID = FxOptionVolatilitiesId.of(\"EUR-USD\");\n  public static final FxOptionMarketDataLookup FX_OPTION_LOOKUP = FxOptionMarketDataLookup.of(CURRENCY_PAIR, VOL_ID);\n  private static final CalculationParameters PARAMS = CalculationParameters.of(RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP);\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_requirementsAndCurrency() {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction function = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction();\n    Set<Measure> measures = function.supportedMeasures();\n    FunctionRequirements reqs = function.requirements(TRADE, measures, PARAMS, REF_DATA);\n    assertThat(reqs.getOutputCurrencies()).containsExactly(EUR, USD);\n    assertThat(reqs.getValueRequirements()).isEqualTo(\n        ImmutableSet.of(DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID, DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID, VOL_ID));\n    assertThat(reqs.getTimeSeriesRequirements()).isEmpty();\n    assertThat(function.naturalCurrency(TRADE, REF_DATA)).isEqualTo(EUR);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_simpleMeasures() {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction function = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction();\n    ScenarioMarketData md = marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.ratesProvider(md.scenario(0));\n    BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv = pricer.presentValue(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedCurrencyExp = pricer.currencyExposure(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    double expectedDelta = pricer.delta(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyAmount expectedCash = pricer.currentCash(RTRADE, VAL_DATE);\n\n    Set<Measure> measures = ImmutableSet.of(\n        Measures.PRESENT_VALUE,\n        Measures.PAR_SPREAD,\n        Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE,\n        Measures.OPTION_DELTA,\n        Measures.CURRENT_CASH,\n        Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET);\n    assertThat(function.calculate(TRADE, measures, PARAMS, md, REF_DATA))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, Result.success(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, Result.success(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCurrencyExp))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.OPTION_DELTA, Result.success(DoubleScenarioArray.of(DoubleArray.of(expectedDelta))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.CURRENT_CASH, Result.success(CurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCash))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, Result.success(RTRADE));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_pv01() {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction function = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction();\n    ScenarioMarketData md = marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.ratesProvider(md.scenario(0));\n    BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    PointSensitivities pvPointSens = pricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities pvParamSens = provider.parameterSensitivity(pvPointSens);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv01 = pvParamSens.total().multipliedBy(1e-4);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities expectedBucketedPv01 = pvParamSens.multipliedBy(1e-4);\n\n    Set<Measure> measures = ImmutableSet.of(\n        Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM,\n        Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED);\n    assertThat(function.calculate(TRADE, measures, PARAMS, md, REF_DATA))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, Result.success(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv01))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, Result.success(ScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedBucketedPv01))));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  static ScenarioMarketData marketData() {\n    Curve curve1 = ConstantCurve.of(Curves.discountFactors(\"Test\", ACT_360), 0.992);\n    Curve curve2 = ConstantCurve.of(Curves.discountFactors(\"Test\", ACT_360), 0.991);\n    TestMarketDataMap md = new TestMarketDataMap(\n        VAL_DATE,\n        ImmutableMap.of(\n            DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID, curve1,\n            DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID, curve2,\n            VOL_ID, VOLS,\n            FxRateId.of(EUR, USD), FxRate.of(EUR, USD, 1.62)),\n        ImmutableMap.of());\n    return md;\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.EUR;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.USD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_360;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_365F;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.common.LongShort.SHORT;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.LocalTime;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.time.ZoneOffset;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.FxRate;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleMatrix;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.FxRateId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.ConstantCurve;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.Curve;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.CurveId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.Curves;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.curve.TestMarketDataMap;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.datasets.RatesProviderDataSets;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilitiesId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilitiesName;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingle;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.BarrierType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.KnockType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;\n\n/**\n * Test {@link FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction}.\n */\npublic class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest {\n\n  private static final ReferenceData REF_DATA = ReferenceData.standard();\n\n  private static final LocalDate VAL_DATE = RatesProviderDataSets.VAL_DATE_2014_01_22;\n  private static final ZoneId ZONE = ZoneId.of(\"Z\");\n  private static final LocalDate PAYMENT_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 5, 13);\n  private static final double NOTIONAL = 1.0e6;\n  private static final CurrencyAmount EUR_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, NOTIONAL);\n  private static final CurrencyAmount USD_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -NOTIONAL * 1.1d);\n  private static final FxSingle FX_PRODUCT = FxSingle.of(EUR_AMOUNT, USD_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_DATE);\n  private static final FxEuropeanOption VANILLA = FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n      .longShort(SHORT)\n      .expiryDate(LocalDate.of(2014, 5, 9))\n      .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(13, 10))\n      .expiryZone(ZONE)\n      .underlying(FX_PRODUCT)\n      .build();\n  private static final FxSingleBarrierOption OPTION_PRODUCT = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\n      .underlyingOption(VANILLA)\n      .barrier(SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_IN, 1.5))\n      .build();\n  private static final TradeInfo TRADE_INFO = TradeInfo.builder().tradeDate(VAL_DATE).build();\n  private static final LocalDate CASH_SETTLE_DATE = LocalDate.of(2014, 1, 25);\n  private static final AdjustablePayment PREMIUM = AdjustablePayment.of(EUR, NOTIONAL * 0.027, CASH_SETTLE_DATE);\n  public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade TRADE = FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n      .premium(PREMIUM)\n      .product(OPTION_PRODUCT)\n      .info(TRADE_INFO)\n      .build();\n  public static final ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOptionTrade RTRADE = TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA);\n\n  private static final CurveId DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID = CurveId.of(\"Default\", \"Discount-EUR\");\n  private static final CurveId DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID = CurveId.of(\"Default\", \"Discount-USD\");\n  static final RatesMarketDataLookup RATES_LOOKUP = RatesMarketDataLookup.of(\n      ImmutableMap.of(EUR, DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID, USD, DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID),\n      ImmutableMap.of());\n\n  private static final DoubleArray TIME_TO_EXPIRY = DoubleArray.of(0.01, 0.252, 0.501, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0);\n  private static final DoubleArray ATM = DoubleArray.of(0.175, 0.185, 0.18, 0.17, 0.16, 0.16);\n  private static final DoubleArray DELTA = DoubleArray.of(0.10, 0.25);\n  private static final DoubleMatrix RISK_REVERSAL = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {-0.010, -0.0050}, {-0.011, -0.0060}, {-0.012, -0.0070},\n      {-0.013, -0.0080}, {-0.014, -0.0090}, {-0.014, -0.0090}});\n  private static final DoubleMatrix STRANGLE = DoubleMatrix.ofUnsafe(new double[][] {\n      {0.0300, 0.0100}, {0.0310, 0.0110}, {0.0320, 0.0120},\n      {0.0330, 0.0130}, {0.0340, 0.0140}, {0.0340, 0.0140}});\n  private static final InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure SMILE_TERM =\n      InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure.of(TIME_TO_EXPIRY, DELTA, ATM, RISK_REVERSAL, STRANGLE, ACT_365F);\n  private static final CurrencyPair CURRENCY_PAIR = CurrencyPair.of(EUR, USD);\n  public static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities VOLS =\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities.of(\n          FxOptionVolatilitiesName.of(\"Test\"),\n          CURRENCY_PAIR,\n          VAL_DATE.atStartOfDay(ZoneOffset.UTC),\n          SMILE_TERM);\n\n  private static final FxOptionVolatilitiesId VOL_ID = FxOptionVolatilitiesId.of(\"EUR-USD\");\n  public static final FxOptionMarketDataLookup FX_OPTION_LOOKUP = FxOptionMarketDataLookup.of(CURRENCY_PAIR, VOL_ID);\n  private static final CalculationParameters PARAMS = CalculationParameters.of(RATES_LOOKUP, FX_OPTION_LOOKUP);\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_requirementsAndCurrency() {\n    FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction function = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction();\n    Set<Measure> measures = function.supportedMeasures();\n    FunctionRequirements reqs = function.requirements(TRADE, measures, PARAMS, REF_DATA);\n    assertThat(reqs.getOutputCurrencies()).containsExactly(EUR, USD);\n    assertThat(reqs.getValueRequirements()).isEqualTo(\n        ImmutableSet.of(DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID, DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID, VOL_ID));\n    assertThat(reqs.getTimeSeriesRequirements()).isEmpty();\n    assertThat(function.naturalCurrency(TRADE, REF_DATA)).isEqualTo(EUR);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_simpleMeasures() {\n    FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction function = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction();\n    ScenarioMarketData md = marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.ratesProvider(md.scenario(0));\n    BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv = pricer.presentValue(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedCurrencyExp = pricer.currencyExposure(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    double expectedDelta = pricer.delta(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyAmount expectedCash = pricer.currentCash(RTRADE, VAL_DATE);\n\n    Set<Measure> measures = ImmutableSet.of(\n        Measures.PRESENT_VALUE,\n        Measures.PAR_SPREAD,\n        Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE,\n        Measures.OPTION_DELTA,\n        Measures.CURRENT_CASH,\n        Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET);\n    assertThat(function.calculate(TRADE, measures, PARAMS, md, REF_DATA))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, Result.success(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, Result.success(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCurrencyExp))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.OPTION_DELTA, Result.success(DoubleScenarioArray.of(DoubleArray.of(expectedDelta))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.CURRENT_CASH, Result.success(CurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedCash))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, Result.success(RTRADE));\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_pv01() {\n    FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction function = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction();\n    ScenarioMarketData md = marketData();\n    RatesProvider provider = RATES_LOOKUP.ratesProvider(md.scenario(0));\n    BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer pricer = BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n    PointSensitivities pvPointSens = pricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(RTRADE, provider, VOLS);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities pvParamSens = provider.parameterSensitivity(pvPointSens);\n    MultiCurrencyAmount expectedPv01 = pvParamSens.total().multipliedBy(1e-4);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities expectedBucketedPv01 = pvParamSens.multipliedBy(1e-4);\n\n    Set<Measure> measures = ImmutableSet.of(\n        Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM,\n        Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED);\n    assertThat(function.calculate(TRADE, measures, PARAMS, md, REF_DATA))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, Result.success(MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedPv01))))\n        .containsEntry(\n            Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, Result.success(ScenarioArray.of(ImmutableList.of(expectedBucketedPv01))));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  static ScenarioMarketData marketData() {\n    Curve curve1 = ConstantCurve.of(Curves.discountFactors(\"Test\", ACT_360), 0.992);\n    Curve curve2 = ConstantCurve.of(Curves.discountFactors(\"Test\", ACT_360), 0.991);\n    TestMarketDataMap md = new TestMarketDataMap(\n        VAL_DATE,\n        ImmutableMap.of(\n            DISCOUNT_CURVE_EUR_ID, curve1,\n            DISCOUNT_CURVE_USD_ID, curve2,\n            VOL_ID, VOLS,\n            FxRateId.of(EUR, USD), FxRate.of(EUR, USD, 1.62)),\n        ImmutableMap.of());\n    return md;\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

{
  "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.GBP;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency.USD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayConventions.FOLLOWING;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts.ACT_365F;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarIds.GBLO;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarIds.USNY;\nimport static
