com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.type.FixedOvernightSwapConventions;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swap.type.FixedOvernightSwapTemplate;\n\n/**\n * Test {@code FxOptionVolatilitiesMarketDataFunction}.\n */\npublic class FxOptionVolatilitiesMarketDataFunctionTest {\n\n  private static final ReferenceData REF_DATA = ReferenceData.standard();\n  private static final LocalDate VALUATION_DATE = LocalDate.of(2017, 2, 15);\n  private static final LocalTime VALUATION_TIME = LocalTime.NOON;\n  private static final LocalTime VALUATION_TIME_1 = LocalTime.MIDNIGHT;\n  private static final ZoneId ZONE = ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\");\n  private static final CurrencyPair GBP_USD = CurrencyPair.of(GBP, USD);\n  private static final HolidayCalendarId NY_LO = USNY.combinedWith(GBLO);\n  private static final DaysAdjustment SPOT_OFFSET = DaysAdjustment.NONE;\n  private static final BusinessDayAdjustment BDA = BusinessDayAdjustment.of(FOLLOWING, NY_LO);\n\n  private static final List<Tenor> VOL_TENORS = ImmutableList.of(Tenor.TENOR_3M, Tenor.TENOR_6M);\n  private static final List<Strike> STRIKES = ImmutableList.of(\n      DeltaStrike.of(0.5), DeltaStrike.of(0.1), DeltaStrike.of(0.1), DeltaStrike.of(0.25), DeltaStrike.of(0.25));\n  private static final List<ValueType> VALUE_TYPES = ImmutableList.of(\n      ValueType.BLACK_VOLATILITY, ValueType.RISK_REVERSAL, ValueType.STRANGLE, ValueType.RISK_REVERSAL, ValueType.STRANGLE);\n  private static final double[][] VOL_QUOTES = new double[][] {\n      {0.18, -0.011, 0.031, -0.006, 0.011}, {0.14, -0.012, 0.032, -0.007, 0.012}};\n  private static final double[][] VOL_QUOTES_1 = new double[][] {\n      {0.24, -0.021, 0.043, -0.013, 0.021}, {0.11, -0.022, 0.042, -0.017, 0.022}};\n  private static final List<Double> USD_QUOTES = ImmutableList.of(\n      1.1E-5, 1.1E-5, 1.12E-5, 1.39E-5, 2.1E-5, 3.0E-5, 5.0E-5, 7.02E-5, 1.01E-4, 1.22E-4, 1.41E-4, 1.85E-4);\n  private static final List<Double> USD_QUOTES_1 = ImmutableList.of(\n      1.2E-5, 1.2E-5, 1.22E-5, 1.49E-5, 2.2E-5, 3.1E-5, 5.1E-5, 7.12E-5, 1.11E-4, 1.32E-4, 1.51E-4, 1.95E-4);\n  private static final List<Double> GBP_QUOTES = ImmutableList.of(\n      -3.53E-4, -7.02E-4, -0.00101, -0.00204, -0.0026, -0.00252, -8.0E-4);\n  private static final List<Double> GBP_QUOTES_1 = ImmutableList.of(\n      -2.53E-4, -6.02E-4, -0.00001, -0.00104, -0.0016, -0.00152, -7.0E-4);\n  private static final List<Tenor> USD_TENORS = ImmutableList.of(\n      Tenor.TENOR_1M, Tenor.TENOR_2M, Tenor.TENOR_3M, Tenor.TENOR_6M, Tenor.TENOR_9M, Tenor.TENOR_1Y, Tenor.TENOR_18M,\n      Tenor.TENOR_2Y, Tenor.TENOR_3Y, Tenor.TENOR_4Y, Tenor.TENOR_5Y, Tenor.TENOR_10Y);\n  private static final List<Period> GBP_PERIODS = ImmutableList.of(\n      Period.ofMonths(1), Period.ofMonths(2), Period.ofMonths(3), Period.ofMonths(6), Period.ofMonths(9), Period.ofYears(1),\n      Period.ofMonths(18));\n  private static final FxRate FX = FxRate.of(GBP_USD, 1.53);\n  private static final FxRate FX_1 = FxRate.of(GBP_USD, 1.43);\n  private static final ImmutableMap<FxRateId, FxRate> MARKET_FX_QUOTES = ImmutableMap.of(FxRateId.of(GBP_USD), FX);\n  private static final ImmutableMap<FxRateId, MarketDataBox<FxRate>> SCENARIO_MARKET_FX_QUOTES = ImmutableMap.of(\n      FxRateId.of(GBP_USD), MarketDataBox.ofScenarioValues(FX, FX_1));\n\n  private static final ImmutableList<FxOptionVolatilitiesNode> VOL_NODES;\n  private static final ImmutableList<FxSwapCurveNode> GBP_NODES;\n  private static final ImmutableList<FixedOvernightSwapCurveNode> USD_NODES;\n  private static final ImmutableMap<QuoteId, Double> MARKET_QUOTES;\n  private static final ImmutableMap<QuoteId, MarketDataBox<Double>> SCENARIO_MARKET_QUOTES;\n  static {\n    ImmutableList.Builder<FxOptionVolatilitiesNode> volNodeBuilder = ImmutableList.builder();\n    ImmutableMap.Builder<QuoteId, Double> marketQuoteBuilder = ImmutableMap.builder();\n    ImmutableMap.Builder<QuoteId, MarketDataBox<Double>> scenarioMarketQuoteBuilder = ImmutableMap.builder();\n    ImmutableList.Builder<FixedOvernightSwapCurveNode> usdNodeBuilder = ImmutableList.builder();\n    ImmutableList.Builder<FxSwapCurveNode> gbpNodeBuilder = ImmutableList.builder();\n    for (int i = 0; i < VOL_TENORS.size(); ++i) {\n      for (int j = 0; j < STRIKES.size(); ++j) {\n        QuoteId quoteId = QuoteId.of(StandardId.of(\n            \"OG\", VOL_TENORS.get(i).toString() + \"_\" + STRIKES.get(j).getLabel() + \"_\" + VALUE_TYPES.get(j).toString()));\n        volNodeBuilder.add(FxOptionVolatilitiesNode.of(\n            GBP_USD, SPOT_OFFSET, BDA, VALUE_TYPES.get(j), quoteId, VOL_TENORS.get(i), STRIKES.get(j)));\n        marketQuoteBuilder.put(quoteId, VOL_QUOTES[i][j]);\n        scenarioMarketQuoteBuilder.put(quoteId, MarketDataBox.ofScenarioValues(VOL_QUOTES[i][j], VOL_QUOTES_1[i][j]));\n      }\n    }\n    for (int i = 0; i < USD_QUOTES.size(); ++i) {\n      QuoteId quoteId = QuoteId.of(StandardId.of(\"OG\", USD.toString() + \"-OIS-\" + USD_TENORS.get(i).toString()));\n      usdNodeBuilder.add(FixedOvernightSwapCurveNode.of(\n          FixedOvernightSwapTemplate.of(USD_TENORS.get(i), FixedOvernightSwapConventions.USD_FIXED_TERM_FED_FUND_OIS), quoteId));\n      marketQuoteBuilder.put(quoteId, USD_QUOTES.get(i));\n      scenarioMarketQuoteBuilder.put(quoteId, MarketDataBox.ofScenarioValues(USD_QUOTES.get(i), USD_QUOTES_1.get(i)));\n    }\n    for (int i = 0; i < GBP_QUOTES.size(); ++i) {\n      QuoteId quoteId = QuoteId.of(StandardId.of(\"OG\", GBP_USD.toString() + \"-FX-\" + GBP_PERIODS.get(i).toString()));\n      gbpNodeBuilder.add(FxSwapCurveNode.of(FxSwapTemplate.of(GBP_PERIODS.get(i), FxSwapConventions.GBP_USD), quoteId));\n      marketQuoteBuilder.put(quoteId, GBP_QUOTES.get(i));\n      scenarioMarketQuoteBuilder.put(quoteId, MarketDataBox.ofScenarioValues(GBP_QUOTES.get(i), GBP_QUOTES_1.get(i)));\n    }\n    VOL_NODES = volNodeBuilder.build();\n    USD_NODES = usdNodeBuilder.build();\n    GBP_NODES = gbpNodeBuilder.build();\n    MARKET_QUOTES = marketQuoteBuilder.build();\n    SCENARIO_MARKET_QUOTES = scenarioMarketQuoteBuilder.build();\n  }\n  private static final ImmutableMarketData MARKET_DATA = ImmutableMarketData.builder(VALUATION_DATE)\n      .addValueMap(MARKET_QUOTES)\n      .addValueMap(MARKET_FX_QUOTES)\n      .build();\n  private static final LocalDate VALUATION_DATE_1 = VALUATION_DATE.plusDays(7);\n  private static final MarketDataBox<LocalDate> VALUATION_DATES = MarketDataBox.ofScenarioValues(\n      VALUATION_DATE, VALUATION_DATE_1);\n  private static final ImmutableScenarioMarketData SCENARIO_MARKET_DATA = ImmutableScenarioMarketData.builder(VALUATION_DATES)\n      .addBoxMap(SCENARIO_MARKET_QUOTES)\n      .addBoxMap(SCENARIO_MARKET_FX_QUOTES)\n      .build();\n\n  private static final FxOptionVolatilitiesName VOL_NAME = FxOptionVolatilitiesName.of(GBP_USD.toString() + \"_VOL\");\n  private static final FxOptionVolatilitiesId VOL_ID = FxOptionVolatilitiesId.of(VOL_NAME);\n  private static final FxOptionVolatilitiesDefinition VOL_DEFINITION =\n      FxOptionVolatilitiesDefinition.of(BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilitiesSpecification.builder()\n          .name(VOL_NAME)\n          .currencyPair(GBP_USD)\n          .dayCount(ACT_365F)\n          .nodes(VOL_NODES)\n          .timeInterpolator(LINEAR)\n          .strikeInterpolator(PCHIP)\n          .build());\n  private static final ValuationZoneTimeDefinition ZT_DEFINITION = ValuationZoneTimeDefinition.of(\n      VALUATION_TIME, ZONE);\n  private static final ValuationZoneTimeDefinition SCENARIO_ZT_DEFINITION = ValuationZoneTimeDefinition.of(\n      VALUATION_TIME, ZONE, VALUATION_TIME, VALUATION_TIME_1);\n\n  private static final CurveGroupName CURVE_GROUP_NAME = CurveGroupName.of(\"USD-DSCONOIS-GBP-DSCFX\");\n  private static final CurveName USD_CURVE_NAME = CurveName.of(\"USD-DSCON-OIS\");\n  private static final CurveDefinition USD_CURVE_DEFINITION = InterpolatedNodalCurveDefinition.builder()\n      .dayCount(ACT_365F)\n      .interpolator(LINEAR)\n      .extrapolatorLeft(FLAT)\n      .extrapolatorRight(FLAT)\n      .name(USD_CURVE_NAME)\n      .nodes(USD_NODES)\n      .xValueType(ValueType.YEAR_FRACTION)\n      .yValueType(ValueType.ZERO_RATE)\n      .build();\n  private static final RatesCurveGroupEntry USD_ENTRY = RatesCurveGroupEntry.builder()\n      .curveName(USD_CURVE_NAME)\n      .discountCurrencies(USD)\n      .indices(OvernightIndices.USD_FED_FUND)\n      .build();\n  private static final CurveName GBP_CURVE_NAME = CurveName.of(\"GBP-DSC-FX\");\n  private static final CurveDefinition GBP_CURVE_DEFINITION = InterpolatedNodalCurveDefinition.builder()\n      .dayCount(ACT_365F)\n      .interpolator(LINEAR)\n      .extrapolatorLeft(FLAT)\n      .extrapolatorRight(FLAT)\n      .name(GBP_CURVE_NAME)\n      .nodes(GBP_NODES)\n      .xValueType(ValueType.YEAR_FRACTION)\n      .yValueType(ValueType.ZERO_RATE)\n      .build();\n  private static final RatesCurveGroupEntry GBP_ENTRY = RatesCurveGroupEntry.builder()\n      .curveName(GBP_CURVE_NAME)\n      .discountCurrencies(GBP)\n      .build();\n  private static final RatesCurveGroupDefinition CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION = RatesCurveGroupDefinition.of(\n      CURVE_GROUP_NAME, ImmutableList.of(GBP_ENTRY, USD_ENTRY), ImmutableList.of(GBP_CURVE_DEFINITION, USD_CURVE_DEFINITION));\n\n  private static final MarketDataConfig CONFIG = MarketDataConfig.builder()\n      .add(CURVE_GROUP_NAME, CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION)\n      .add(VOL_ID.getName().getName(), VOL_DEFINITION)\n      .addDefault(ZT_DEFINITION)\n      .build();\n  private static final MarketDataConfig SCENARIO_CONFIG = MarketDataConfig.builder()\n      .add(CURVE_GROUP_NAME, CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION)\n      .add(VOL_ID.getName().getName(), VOL_DEFINITION)\n      .addDefault(SCENARIO_ZT_DEFINITION)\n      .build();\n\n  private static final ZonedDateTime EXPIRY = ZonedDateTime.of(2018, 5, 9, 13, 10, 0, 0, ZONE);\n  private static final LocalDate PAYMENT_DATE = LocalDate.of(2018, 5, 13);\n  private static final double NOTIONAL = 1.0e6;\n  private static final CurrencyAmount GBP_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(GBP, NOTIONAL);\n  private static final CurrencyAmount USD_AMOUNT = CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -NOTIONAL * 1.3d);\n  private static final FxSingle FX_PRODUCT = FxSingle.of(GBP_AMOUNT, USD_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_DATE);\n  private static final FxEuropeanOption OPTION_PRODUCT = FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n      .longShort(SHORT)\n      .expiryDate(EXPIRY.toLocalDate())\n      .expiryTime(EXPIRY.toLocalTime())\n      .expiryZone(ZONE)\n      .underlying(FX_PRODUCT)\n      .build();\n  private static final TradeInfo TRADE_INFO = TradeInfo.builder().tradeDate(VALUATION_DATE).build();\n  private static final LocalDate CASH_SETTLE_DATE = VALUATION_DATE.plusDays(1);\n  private static final AdjustablePayment PREMIUM = AdjustablePayment.of(GBP, NOTIONAL * 0.1, CASH_SETTLE_DATE);\n  private static final FxEuropeanOptionTrade OPTION_TRADE = FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n      .premium(PREMIUM)\n      .product(OPTION_PRODUCT)\n      .info(TRADE_INFO)\n      .build();\n  private static final List<CalculationTarget> TARGETS = ImmutableList.of(OPTION_TRADE);\n\n  private static final RatesMarketDataLookup RATES_LOOKUP = RatesMarketDataLookup.of(CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION);\n  private static final FxOptionMarketDataLookup VOL_LOOKUP = FxOptionMarketDataLookup.of(GBP_USD, VOL_ID);\n  private static final CalculationRules RULES = CalculationRules.of(\n      StandardComponents.calculationFunctions(), USD, RATES_LOOKUP, VOL_LOOKUP);\n  private static final List<Column> COLUMN = ImmutableList.of(Column.of(PRESENT_VALUE));\n  private static final MarketDataRequirements REQUIREMENTS = MarketDataRequirements.of(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, REF_DATA);\n  private static final CalculationRunner CALC_RUNNER = CalculationRunner.ofMultiThreaded();\n\n  private static final RatesCurveCalibrator CURVE_CALIBRATOR = RatesCurveCalibrator.standard();\n  private static final RatesProvider EXP_RATES = CURVE_CALIBRATOR.calibrate(CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION, MARKET_DATA, REF_DATA);\n  private static final RatesProvider EXP_RATES_1 = CURVE_CALIBRATOR.calibrate(\n      CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION, SCENARIO_MARKET_DATA.scenario(1), REF_DATA);\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities EXP_VOLS;\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities EXP_VOLS_1;\n  static {\n    List<Double> expiry = VOL_TENORS.stream().map(t -> ACT_365F.relativeYearFraction(\n        VALUATION_DATE, BDA.adjust(SPOT_OFFSET.adjust(VALUATION_DATE, REF_DATA).plus(t), REF_DATA))).collect(toList());\n    int nSmiles = expiry.size();\n    double[] atm = new double[nSmiles];\n    double[][] rr = new double[nSmiles][2];\n    double[][] str = new double[nSmiles][2];\n    for (int i = 0; i < nSmiles; ++i) {\n      atm[i] = VOL_QUOTES[i][0];\n      rr[i][0] = VOL_QUOTES[i][1];\n      rr[i][1] = VOL_QUOTES[i][3];\n      str[i][0] = VOL_QUOTES[i][2];\n      str[i][1] = VOL_QUOTES[i][4];\n    }\n    InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure term = InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure.of(\n        DoubleArray.copyOf(expiry), DoubleArray.of(0.1, 0.25), DoubleArray.copyOf(atm), DoubleMatrix.copyOf(rr),\n        DoubleMatrix.copyOf(str), ACT_365F, LINEAR, FLAT, FLAT, PCHIP, FLAT, FLAT);\n    EXP_VOLS = BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities.of(VOL_NAME, GBP_USD, VALUATION_DATE.atTime(VALUATION_TIME).atZone(ZONE), term);\n    for (int i = 0; i < nSmiles; ++i) {\n      atm[i] = VOL_QUOTES_1[i][0];\n      rr[i][0] = VOL_QUOTES_1[i][1];\n      rr[i][1] = VOL_QUOTES_1[i][3];\n      str[i][0] = VOL_QUOTES_1[i][2];\n      str[i][1] = VOL_QUOTES_1[i][4];\n    }\n    InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure term1 = InterpolatedStrikeSmileDeltaTermStructure.of(\n        DoubleArray.copyOf(expiry), DoubleArray.of(0.1, 0.25), DoubleArray.copyOf(atm), DoubleMatrix.copyOf(rr),\n        DoubleMatrix.copyOf(str), ACT_365F, LINEAR, FLAT, FLAT, PCHIP, FLAT, FLAT);\n    EXP_VOLS_1 = BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities.of(\n        VOL_NAME, GBP_USD, VALUATION_DATE_1.atTime(VALUATION_TIME_1).atZone(ZONE), term1);\n  }\n  private static final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer PRICER = BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT;\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_singleMarketData() {\n    MarketData marketDataCalibrated = StandardComponents.marketDataFactory().create(\n        REQUIREMENTS, CONFIG, MARKET_DATA, REF_DATA);\n    Results results = CALC_RUNNER.calculate(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, marketDataCalibrated, REF_DATA);\n    CurrencyAmount computed = results.get(0, 0, CurrencyAmount.class).getValue();\n    CurrencyAmount expected = PRICER.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA), EXP_RATES, EXP_VOLS)\n        .convertedTo(USD, EXP_RATES);\n    assertThat(computed).isEqualTo(expected);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_scenarioMarketData() {\n    ScenarioMarketData marketDataCalibrated = StandardComponents.marketDataFactory().createMultiScenario(\n        REQUIREMENTS, SCENARIO_CONFIG, SCENARIO_MARKET_DATA, REF_DATA, ScenarioDefinition.empty());\n    Results results = CALC_RUNNER.calculateMultiScenario(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, marketDataCalibrated, REF_DATA);\n    CurrencyScenarioArray pvs = results.get(0, 0, CurrencyScenarioArray.class).getValue();\n    CurrencyAmount pv0 = PRICER.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA), EXP_RATES, EXP_VOLS)\n        .convertedTo(USD, EXP_RATES);\n    CurrencyAmount pv1 = PRICER.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA), EXP_RATES_1, EXP_VOLS_1)\n        .convertedTo(USD, EXP_RATES_1);\n    assertThat(pvs.get(0)).isEqualTo(pv0);\n    assertThat(pvs.get(1)).isEqualTo(pv1);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_quote_secenarioDefinition() {\n    List<PerturbationMapping<?>> perturbationMapping = new ArrayList<>();\n    int nScenarios = 3;\n    for (Entry<QuoteId, Double> entry : MARKET_QUOTES.entrySet()) {\n      DoubleArray shifts = DoubleArray.of(nScenarios, n -> Math.pow(0.9, n));\n      ScenarioPerturbation<Double> perturb = GenericDoubleShifts.of(ShiftType.SCALED, shifts);\n      perturbationMapping.add(PerturbationMapping.of(MarketDataFilter.ofId(entry.getKey()), perturb));\n    }\n    ScenarioDefinition scenarioDefinition = ScenarioDefinition.ofMappings(perturbationMapping);\n    ScenarioMarketData marketDataCalibrated = StandardComponents.marketDataFactory().createMultiScenario(\n        REQUIREMENTS, SCENARIO_CONFIG, MARKET_DATA, REF_DATA, scenarioDefinition);\n    Results results = CALC_RUNNER.calculateMultiScenario(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, marketDataCalibrated, REF_DATA);\n    CurrencyScenarioArray pvs = results.get(0, 0, CurrencyScenarioArray.class).getValue();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nScenarios; ++i) {\n      ImmutableMap.Builder<QuoteId, Double> builder = ImmutableMap.builder();\n      for (Entry<QuoteId, Double> entry : MARKET_QUOTES.entrySet()) {\n        builder.put(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue() * Math.pow(0.9, i));\n      }\n      ImmutableMarketData shiftedMarketData = ImmutableMarketData.builder(VALUATION_DATE)\n          .addValueMap(builder.build())\n          .addValueMap(MARKET_FX_QUOTES)\n          .build();\n      MarketData shiftedMarketDataCalibrated = StandardComponents.marketDataFactory().create(\n          REQUIREMENTS, CONFIG, shiftedMarketData, REF_DATA);\n      Results shiftedResults = CALC_RUNNER.calculate(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, shiftedMarketDataCalibrated, REF_DATA);\n      CurrencyAmount pv = shiftedResults.get(0, 0, CurrencyAmount.class).getValue();\n      assertThat(pvs.get(i)).isEqualTo(pv);\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_parameter_secenarioDefinition() {\n    List<PerturbationMapping<?>> perturbationMapping = new ArrayList<>();\n    int nVolParams = EXP_VOLS.getParameterCount();\n    int nScenarios = 3;\n    PointShiftsBuilder builder = PointShifts.builder(ShiftType.SCALED);\n    for (int i = 0; i < nVolParams; ++i) {\n      Object id = EXP_VOLS.getParameterMetadata(i).getIdentifier();\n      for (int j = 0; j < nScenarios; ++j) {\n        builder.addShift(j, id, Math.pow(0.9, j));\n      }\n    }\n    ScenarioPerturbation<ParameterizedData> perturb = builder.build();\n    perturbationMapping.add(PerturbationMapping.of(MarketDataFilter.ofId(VOL_ID), perturb));\n    ScenarioDefinition scenarioDefinition = ScenarioDefinition.ofMappings(perturbationMapping);\n    ScenarioMarketData marketDataCalibrated = StandardComponents.marketDataFactory().createMultiScenario(\n        REQUIREMENTS, SCENARIO_CONFIG, MARKET_DATA, REF_DATA, scenarioDefinition);\n    Results results = CALC_RUNNER.calculateMultiScenario(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, marketDataCalibrated, REF_DATA);\n    CurrencyScenarioArray pvs = results.get(0, 0, CurrencyScenarioArray.class).getValue();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nScenarios; ++i) {\n      int index = i;\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities shiftedSmile = EXP_VOLS.withPerturbation((j, v, m) -> Math.pow(0.9, index) * v);\n      CurrencyAmount pv = PRICER.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA), EXP_RATES, shiftedSmile)\n          .convertedTo(USD, EXP_RATES);\n      assertThat(pvs.get(i)).isEqualTo(pv);\n    }\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_builtData() {\n    List<PerturbationMapping<?>> perturbationMapping = new ArrayList<>();\n    int nScenarios = 3;\n    for (Entry<QuoteId, Double> entry : MARKET_QUOTES.entrySet()) {\n      DoubleArray shifts = DoubleArray.of(nScenarios, n -> Math.pow(0.9, n));\n      ScenarioPerturbation<Double> perturb = GenericDoubleShifts.of(ShiftType.SCALED, shifts);\n      perturbationMapping.add(PerturbationMapping.of(MarketDataFilter.ofId(entry.getKey()), perturb));\n    }\n    ScenarioDefinition scenarioDefinition = ScenarioDefinition.ofMappings(perturbationMapping);\n    ImmutableMarketData dataWithSurface = ImmutableMarketData.builder(VALUATION_DATE)\n        .addValueMap(MARKET_QUOTES)\n        .addValueMap(MARKET_FX_QUOTES)\n        .addValue(VOL_ID, EXP_VOLS)\n        .addValue(RatesCurveGroupId.of(CURVE_GROUP_NAME),\n            RatesCurveGroup.ofCurves(CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION, EXP_RATES.toImmutableRatesProvider().getDiscountCurves().values()))\n        .build();\n    ScenarioMarketData marketDataCalibrated = StandardComponents.marketDataFactory().createMultiScenario(\n        REQUIREMENTS, SCENARIO_CONFIG, dataWithSurface, REF_DATA, scenarioDefinition);\n    Results results = CALC_RUNNER.calculateMultiScenario(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, marketDataCalibrated, REF_DATA);\n    CurrencyScenarioArray computed = results.get(0, 0, CurrencyScenarioArray.class).getValue();\n    CurrencyAmount expected = PRICER.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA), EXP_RATES, EXP_VOLS)\n        .convertedTo(USD, EXP_RATES);\n    // dependency graph is absent, thus scenarios are not created\n    assertThat(computed.getScenarioCount() == 1).isTrue();\n    assertThat(computed.get(0)).isEqualTo(expected);\n  }\n\n  private static final List<Tenor> SURFACE_TENORS = ImmutableList.of(Tenor.TENOR_3M, Tenor.TENOR_6M, Tenor.TENOR_1Y);\n  private static final List<Double> SURFACE_STRIKES = ImmutableList.of(1.35, 1.5, 1.65, 1.7);\n  private static final double[][] SURFACE_VOL_QUOTES = new double[][] {\n      {0.19, 0.15, 0.13, 0.14}, {0.14, 0.11, 0.09, 0.09}, {0.11, 0.09, 0.07, 0.07}};\n  private static final ImmutableList<FxOptionVolatilitiesNode> SURFACE_NODES;\n  private static final ImmutableMap<QuoteId, Double> SURFACE_QUOTES;\n  static {\n    ImmutableList.Builder<FxOptionVolatilitiesNode> nodeBuilder = ImmutableList.builder();\n    ImmutableMap.Builder<QuoteId, Double> quoteBuilder = ImmutableMap.builder();\n    for (int i = 0; i < SURFACE_TENORS.size(); ++i) {\n      for (int j = 0; j < SURFACE_STRIKES.size(); ++j) {\n        QuoteId quoteId = QuoteId.of(StandardId.of(\n            \"OG\", GBP_USD.toString() + \"_\" + SURFACE_TENORS.get(i).toString() + \"_\" + SURFACE_STRIKES.get(j)));\n        quoteBuilder.put(quoteId, SURFACE_VOL_QUOTES[i][j]);\n        nodeBuilder.add(FxOptionVolatilitiesNode.of(\n            GBP_USD, SPOT_OFFSET, BDA, ValueType.BLACK_VOLATILITY, quoteId, SURFACE_TENORS.get(i),\n            SimpleStrike.of(SURFACE_STRIKES.get(j))));\n      }\n    }\n    SURFACE_NODES = nodeBuilder.build();\n    SURFACE_QUOTES = quoteBuilder.build();\n  }\n  private static final MarketData SURFACE_MARKET_DATA = MARKET_DATA.combinedWith(MarketData.of(VALUATION_DATE, SURFACE_QUOTES));\n  private static final FxOptionVolatilitiesDefinition VOL_DEFINITION_SURFACE = FxOptionVolatilitiesDefinition.of(\n      BlackFxOptionInterpolatedNodalSurfaceVolatilitiesSpecification.builder()\n          .name(VOL_NAME)\n          .currencyPair(GBP_USD)\n          .dayCount(ACT_365F)\n          .nodes(SURFACE_NODES)\n          .timeInterpolator(LINEAR)\n          .timeExtrapolatorLeft(FLAT)\n          .timeExtrapolatorRight(FLAT)\n          .strikeInterpolator(PCHIP)\n          .strikeExtrapolatorLeft(FLAT)\n          .strikeExtrapolatorLeft(FLAT)\n          .build());\n  private static final MarketDataConfig SURFACE_CONFIG = MarketDataConfig.builder()\n      .add(CURVE_GROUP_NAME, CURVE_GROUP_DEFINITION)\n      .add(VOL_ID.getName().getName(), VOL_DEFINITION_SURFACE)\n      .addDefault(ZT_DEFINITION)\n      .build();\n  private static final BlackFxOptionSurfaceVolatilities SURFACE_EXP_VOLS;\n  static {\n    List<Double> expiry = new ArrayList<>();\n    List<Double> strike = new ArrayList<>();\n    List<Double> vols = new ArrayList<>();\n    for (int i = 0; i < SURFACE_TENORS.size(); ++i) {\n      for (int j = 0; j < SURFACE_STRIKES.size(); ++j) {\n        double yearFraction = ACT_365F.relativeYearFraction(\n            VALUATION_DATE, BDA.adjust(SPOT_OFFSET.adjust(VALUATION_DATE, REF_DATA).plus(SURFACE_TENORS.get(i)), REF_DATA));\n        expiry.add(yearFraction);\n        strike.add(SURFACE_STRIKES.get(j));\n        vols.add(SURFACE_VOL_QUOTES[i][j]);\n      }\n    }\n    SurfaceInterpolator interp = GridSurfaceInterpolator.of(LINEAR, PCHIP);\n    InterpolatedNodalSurface surface = InterpolatedNodalSurface.ofUnsorted(\n        Surfaces.blackVolatilityByExpiryStrike(VOL_NAME.getName(), ACT_365F),\n        DoubleArray.copyOf(expiry), DoubleArray.copyOf(strike), DoubleArray.copyOf(vols), interp);\n    SURFACE_EXP_VOLS = BlackFxOptionSurfaceVolatilities.of(\n        VOL_NAME, GBP_USD, VALUATION_DATE.atTime(VALUATION_TIME).atZone(ZONE), surface);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_surface() {\n    MarketData marketDataCalibrated = StandardComponents.marketDataFactory().create(\n        REQUIREMENTS, SURFACE_CONFIG, SURFACE_MARKET_DATA, REF_DATA);\n    Results results = CALC_RUNNER.calculate(RULES, TARGETS, COLUMN, marketDataCalibrated, REF_DATA);\n    CurrencyAmount computed = results.get(0, 0, CurrencyAmount.class).getValue();\n    CurrencyAmount expected = PRICER.presentValue(OPTION_TRADE.resolve(REF_DATA), EXP_RATES, SURFACE_EXP_VOLS)\n        .convertedTo(USD, EXP_RATES);\n    assertThat(computed).isEqualTo(expected);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.",

  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n   */\n  private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * \n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n    this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> presentValue(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // present value for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  // point sensitivity\n  private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSens;\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      pointSens = vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates vega (present value volatility sensitivities) for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // vega for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\n      return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    } else {\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n      return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currencyExposure(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // currency exposure for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates delta for all scenarios\n  DoubleScenarioArray delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> delta(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // delta for one scenario\n  double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n          \"FX vanilla option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\");\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates current cash for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currentCash(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // current cash for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      LocalDate valuationDate,\n      FxVanillaOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxVanillaOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    }\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {

        "+import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;",

com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n   */\n  private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,",

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2021 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.loader.csv.CsvLoaderColumns.TRADE_TYPE_FIELD;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.time.ZoneId;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvOutput;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;\n\n/**\n * Handles the CSV files format for FX Single Barrier Option trades.\n */\npublic class FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin implements TradeCsvParserPlugin, TradeCsvWriterPlugin<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The singleton instance of the plugin.\n   */\n  public static final FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin INSTANCE = new FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin();\n\n  /**\n   * The CSV headers.\n   */\n  public static final Set<String> HEADERS = ImmutableSet.<String>builder()\n      .addAll(FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.INSTANCE.headers(ImmutableList.of()))\n      .add(BARRIER_TYPE_FIELD)\n      .add(KNOCK_TYPE_FIELD)\n      .add(BARRIER_LEVEL_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD)\n      .add(REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD)\n      .build();\n\n  /**\n   * Restricted constructor\n   */\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin() {\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> tradeTypeNames() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(\"FXSINGLEBARRIEROPTION\", \"FX SINGLE BARRIER OPTION\");\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<Trade> parseTrade(\n      Class<?> requiredJavaType,\n      CsvRow baseRow,\n      List<CsvRow> additionalRows,\n      TradeInfo info,\n      TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n\n    if (requiredJavaType.isAssignableFrom(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class)) {\n      return Optional.of(parse(baseRow, info, resolver));\n    }\n    return Optional.empty();\n  }\n\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade parse(CsvRow row, TradeInfo info, TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver) {\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade vanillaOptionTrade = resolver.parseFxEuropeanOptionTrade(row, info);\n    Barrier barrier = CsvLoaderUtils.parseBarrierFromDefaultFields(row);\n\n    FxSingleBarrierOption.Builder productBuilder = FxSingleBarrierOption.builder()\n        .underlyingOption(vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct())\n        .barrier(barrier);\n\n    CsvLoaderUtils.tryParseCurrencyAmountWithDirection(\n        row,\n        REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD\n    ).ifPresent(productBuilder::rebate);\n\n    FxEuropeanOption option = vanillaOptionTrade.getProduct();\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n        .product(productBuilder.build())\n        .premium(CsvLoaderUtils.tryParsePremiumFromDefaultFields(row)\n            .orElse(AdjustablePayment.of(option.getCurrencyPair().getBase(), 0d, option.getExpiryDate())))\n        .info(info)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public String getName() {\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class.getSimpleName();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Class<?>> supportedTradeTypes() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.class);\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<String> headers(List<FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade> trades) {\n    return HEADERS;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public void writeCsv(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade trade) {\n    csv.writeCell(TRADE_TYPE_FIELD, \"FxSingleBarrierOption\");\n    writeSingleBarrierOption(csv, trade.getProduct());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writePremiumFields(csv, trade.getPremium());\n    csv.writeNewLine();\n  }\n\n  void writeSingleBarrierOption(CsvOutput.CsvRowOutputWithHeaders csv, FxSingleBarrierOption product) {\n    CsvWriterUtils.writeFxEuropeanOption(csv, product.getUnderlyingOption());\n    CsvWriterUtils.writeBarrier(csv, product.getBarrier(), LocalDate.now(ZoneId.systemDefault()));\n    product.getRebate().ifPresent(ccyAmount -> CsvWriterUtils.writeCurrencyAmount(\n        csv,\n        ccyAmount,\n        REBATE_AMOUNT_FIELD,\n        REBATE_CURRENCY_FIELD,\n        REBATE_DIRECTION_FIELD));\n  }\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.collect.io.CsvRow;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.Trade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;",
        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;",
        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.Barrier;",
        " ",
        " /**"
      ],
      "newLines": 10,
      "newStart": 26,
      "oldLines": 10,
      "oldStart": 26
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive.PAY;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.common.PayReceive.RECEIVE;\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.Swaption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.swaption.SwaptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Test {@link TradeCsvLoader}.\n */\npublic class TradeCsvLoaderTest {\n\n  private static final ReferenceData REF_DATA = ReferenceData.standard();\n  private static final int NUMBER_SWAPS = 8;\n\n  private static final ResourceLocator FILE =\n      ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/trades.csv\");\n  private static final ResourceLocator FILE_CPTY =\n      ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/trades-cpty.csv\");\n  private static final ResourceLocator FILE_CPTY2 =\n      ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/trades-cpty2.csv\");\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_isKnownFormat() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    assertThat(test.isKnownFormat(FILE.getCharSource())).isTrue();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_mixed() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/mixed-trades-positions.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(1);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures()).first().hasToString(\n        \"PARSING: CSV position file 'mixed-trades-positions.csv' contained row with mixed \" +\n            \"trade/position/sensitivity type 'FX/EtdFuture/CRIF' at line 6\");\n\n    List<Trade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(2).allMatch(trade -> trade instanceof FxSingleTrade);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_failures() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.load(FILE);\n\n    assertThat(trades.getFailures().size()).as(trades.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_forwards() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<FxSingleTrade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources, FxSingleTrade.class);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n\n    List<FxSingleTrade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(2);\n\n    FxSingleTrade expected0 = FxSingleTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-06\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId1\"))\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpIds.CME)\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.BUY_SELL, SELL)\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSingle.of(\n            CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -3850000),\n            FxRate.of(USD, INR, 67.40),\n            LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-08\"),\n            BusinessDayAdjustment.of(FOLLOWING, USNY)))\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(0), expected0);\n\n    FxSingleTrade expected1 = FxSingleTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-22\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId2\"))\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpIds.CME)\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.BUY_SELL, BUY)\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSingle.of(CurrencyAmount.of(EUR, 1920000), FxRate.of(EUR, CZK, 25.62), LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-24\")))\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(1), expected1);\n\n    checkRoundtrip(FxSingleTrade.class, loadedTrades, expected0, expected1);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_forwards_with_legs_in_same_direction() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades_legs_same_direction.csv\");\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> loadedData = standard.load(locator);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(1);\n    FailureItem failureItem = loadedData.getFailures().get(0);\n    assertThat(failureItem.getReason().toString()).isEqualTo(\"PARSING\");\n    assertThat(failureItem.getMessage())\n        .isEqualTo(\"CSV trade file 'fxtrades_legs_same_direction.csv' type 'FX' could not be parsed at line 2: \" +\n            \"FxSingle legs must not have the same direction: Pay, Pay\");\n    List<Trade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(0);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_forwards_fullFormat() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades2.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<FxSingleTrade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources, FxSingleTrade.class);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n\n    List<FxSingleTrade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(5);\n\n    FxSingleTrade expectedTrade1 = FxSingleTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-06\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId1\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSingle.of(\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.USD, -3850000),\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.INR, 715405000),\n            LocalDate.parse(\"2017-12-08\")))\n        .build();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades.get(0)).isEqualTo(expectedTrade1);\n\n    FxSingleTrade expectedTrade2 = FxSingleTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2017-01-11\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId5\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSingle.of(\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.USD, -6608000),\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.TWD, 95703040),\n            LocalDate.parse(\"2017-07-13\")))\n        .build();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades.get(1)).isEqualTo(expectedTrade2);\n\n    FxSingleTrade expectedTrade3 = FxSingleTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2017-01-25\"))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(11, 0))\n            .zone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId6\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSingle.of(\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.EUR, -1920000),\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.CZK, 12448000),\n            LocalDate.parse(\"2018-01-29\"),\n            BusinessDayAdjustment.of(BusinessDayConventions.FOLLOWING, EUTA.combinedWith(CZPR))))\n        .build();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades.get(2)).isEqualTo(expectedTrade3);\n\n    FxSingleTrade expectedTrade4 = FxSingleTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2017-01-25\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId7\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSingle.of(\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.EUR, -1920000),\n            CurrencyAmount.of(Currency.CZK, 12256000),\n            LocalDate.parse(\"2018-01-29\")))\n        .build();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades.get(3)).isEqualTo(expectedTrade4);\n\n    FxSingleTrade expectedTrade5 = FxSingleTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2017-01-25\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId8\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSingle.of(\n            Payment.of(Currency.EUR, 1920000, LocalDate.parse(\"2018-01-29\")),\n            Payment.of(Currency.CZK, -12256000, LocalDate.parse(\"2018-01-30\")),\n            BusinessDayAdjustment.of(BusinessDayConventions.MODIFIED_FOLLOWING, EUTA.combinedWith(CZPR))))\n        .build();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades.get(4)).isEqualTo(expectedTrade5);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_swaps() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<FxSwapTrade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources, FxSwapTrade.class);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n\n    List<FxSwapTrade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(2);\n\n    FxSingle near1 = FxSingle.of(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 120000), FxRate.of(USD, CAD, 1.31), LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-08\"));\n    FxSingle far1 = FxSingle.of(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -120000), FxRate.of(USD, CAD, 1.34), LocalDate.parse(\"2017-01-08\"));\n    FxSwapTrade expected0 = FxSwapTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-06\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId11\"))\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpIds.CME)\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.BUY_SELL, BUY)\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSwap.of(near1, far1))\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(0), expected0);\n\n    FxSingle near2 = FxSingle.of(CurrencyAmount.of(CAD, -160000), FxRate.of(USD, CAD, 1.32), LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-08\"));\n    FxSingle far2 = FxSingle.of(CurrencyAmount.of(CAD, 160000), FxRate.of(USD, CAD, 1.34), LocalDate.parse(\"2017-01-08\"));\n    FxSwapTrade expected1 = FxSwapTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-06\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId12\"))\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpIds.CME)\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.BUY_SELL, SELL)\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSwap.of(near2, far2))\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(1), expected1);\n\n    checkRoundtrip(FxSwapTrade.class, loadedTrades, expected0, expected1);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_swaps_fullFormat() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades2.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<FxSwapTrade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources, FxSwapTrade.class);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n\n    List<FxSwapTrade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(1);\n\n    FxSingle near1 = FxSingle.of(\n        Payment.of(EUR, 1920000, LocalDate.parse(\"2018-01-29\")),\n        Payment.of(CZK, -12256000, LocalDate.parse(\"2018-01-30\")),\n        BusinessDayAdjustment.of(MODIFIED_FOLLOWING, EUTA.combinedWith(CZPR)));\n    FxSingle far1 = FxSingle.of(\n        Payment.of(EUR, -1920000, LocalDate.parse(\"2018-04-29\")),\n        Payment.of(CZK, 12258000, LocalDate.parse(\"2018-04-30\")),\n        BusinessDayAdjustment.of(MODIFIED_FOLLOWING, EUTA.combinedWith(CZPR)));\n    FxSwapTrade expectedTrade1 = FxSwapTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2017-01-25\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId9\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxSwap.of(near1, far1))\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(0), expectedTrade1);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_vanilla_option() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<FxEuropeanOptionTrade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources, FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n\n    List<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(1);\n\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade expectedTrade0 = FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-06\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId31\"))\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpIds.CME)\n            .build())\n        .product(FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n            .longShort(LongShort.LONG)\n            .expiryDate(LocalDate.of(2017, 1, 8))\n            .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(11, 0))\n            .expiryZone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .underlying(FxSingle.of(\n                CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 30000),\n                FxRate.of(USD, CAD, 1.31),\n                LocalDate.of(2017, 1, 10)))\n            .build())\n        .premium(AdjustablePayment.of(\n            CurrencyAmount.of(GBP, -2000),\n            AdjustableDate.of(LocalDate.of(2016, 12, 8))))\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(0), expectedTrade0);\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_vanilla_option_equivalent() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fx-option-alt.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<FxEuropeanOptionTrade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources, FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n\n    List<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(1);\n\n    FxEuropeanOptionTrade expectedTrade0 = FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(LocalDate.parse(\"2016-12-06\"))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId32\"))\n            .addAttribute(AttributeType.CCP, CcpIds.CME)\n            .build())\n        .product(FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n            .longShort(LongShort.LONG)\n            .expiryDate(LocalDate.of(2017, 1, 8))\n            .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(11, 0))\n            .expiryZone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .underlying(FxSingle.of(\n                CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 30000),\n                FxRate.of(USD, GBP, 1.31),\n                LocalDate.of(2017, 1, 10)))\n            .build())\n        .premium(AdjustablePayment.of(\n            CurrencyAmount.of(GBP, -2000),\n            AdjustableDate.of(LocalDate.of(2016, 12, 8))))\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(0), expectedTrade0);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fx_ndf() {\n    TradeCsvLoader standard = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ResourceLocator locator = ResourceLocator.of(\"classpath:com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/fxtrades2.csv\");\n    ImmutableList<CharSource> charSources = ImmutableList.of(locator.getCharSource());\n    ValueWithFailures<List<FxNdfTrade>> loadedData = standard.parse(charSources, FxNdfTrade.class);\n    assertThat(loadedData.getFailures().size()).as(loadedData.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n\n    List<FxNdfTrade> loadedTrades = loadedData.getValue();\n    assertThat(loadedTrades).hasSize(3);\n\n    FxNdfTrade expectedTrade0 = FxNdfTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(date(2016, 12, 6))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId11\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxNdf.builder()\n            .settlementCurrencyNotional(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 10_000_000))\n            .paymentDate(date(2016, 12, 8))\n            .agreedFxRate(FxRate.of(CurrencyPair.of(USD, INR), 6.5))\n            .index(FxIndex.of(\"USD/INR-FBIL-INR01\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(0), expectedTrade0);\n\n    FxNdfTrade expectedTrade1 = FxNdfTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(date(2016, 12, 6))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId12\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxNdf.builder()\n            .settlementCurrencyNotional(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -20_000_000))\n            .paymentDate(date(2016, 12, 8))\n            .agreedFxRate(FxRate.of(CurrencyPair.of(USD, CLP), 5.8))\n            .index(FxIndex.of(\"USD/CLP-DOLAR-OBS-CLP10\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(1), expectedTrade1);\n\n    HolidayCalendarId usdBrlCalId = HolidayCalendarId.defaultByCurrency(USD)\n        .combinedWith(HolidayCalendarId.defaultByCurrency(BRL));\n    FxNdfTrade expectedTrade2 = FxNdfTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .tradeDate(date(2016, 12, 6))\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"tradeId13\"))\n            .build())\n        .product(FxNdf.builder()\n            .settlementCurrencyNotional(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -30_000_000))\n            .paymentDate(date(2016, 12, 8))\n            .agreedFxRate(FxRate.of(CurrencyPair.of(USD, BRL), 5.5))\n            .index(ImmutableFxIndex.builder()\n                .name(\"USD/BRL\")\n                .currencyPair(CurrencyPair.of(USD, BRL))\n                .fixingCalendar(usdBrlCalId)\n                .maturityDateOffset(DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(2, usdBrlCalId))\n                .build())\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(loadedTrades.get(2), expectedTrade2);\n\n    checkRoundtrip(FxNdfTrade.class, loadedTrades, expectedTrade0, expectedTrade1, expectedTrade2);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fra() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.load(FILE);\n\n    List<FraTrade> filtered = trades.getValue().stream()\n        .flatMap(filtering(FraTrade.class))\n        .collect(toImmutableList());\n    assertThat(filtered).hasSize(3);\n\n    FraTrade expected0 = FraConventions.of(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_3M)\n        .createTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), Period.ofMonths(2), BUY, 1_000_000, 0.005, REF_DATA)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123401\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(11, 5))\n            .zone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected0, filtered.get(0));\n\n    FraTrade expected1 = FraConventions.of(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_6M)\n        .toTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), date(2018, 2, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), SELL, 1_000_000, 0.007)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123402\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(12, 35))\n            .zone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected1, filtered.get(1));\n\n    FraTrade expected2 = FraTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123403\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .product(Fra.builder()\n            .buySell(SELL)\n            .startDate(date(2017, 8, 1))\n            .endDate(date(2018, 1, 15))\n            .notional(1_000_000)\n            .fixedRate(0.0055)\n            .index(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_3M)\n            .indexInterpolated(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_6M)\n            .dayCount(DayCounts.ACT_360)\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected2, filtered.get(2));\n\n    checkRoundtrip(FraTrade.class, filtered, expected0, expected1, expected2);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fra_bothCounterpartyColumnsPresent() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.load(FILE_CPTY);\n\n    List<FraTrade> filtered = trades.getValue().stream()\n        .flatMap(filtering(FraTrade.class))\n        .collect(toImmutableList());\n    assertThat(filtered).hasSize(3);\n\n    FraTrade expected1 = FraConventions.of(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_3M)\n        .createTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), Period.ofMonths(2), BUY, 1_000_000, 0.005, REF_DATA)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123401\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(11, 5))\n            .zone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .counterparty(StandardId.of(\"CPTY\", \"Bank A\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected1, filtered.get(0));\n\n    FraTrade expected2 = FraConventions.of(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_6M)\n        .toTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), date(2018, 2, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), SELL, 1_000_000, 0.007)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123402\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(12, 35))\n            .zone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .counterparty(StandardId.of(OG_COUNTERPARTY, \"Bank B\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected2, filtered.get(1));\n\n    FraTrade expected3 = FraTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123403\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .product(Fra.builder()\n            .buySell(SELL)\n            .startDate(date(2017, 8, 1))\n            .endDate(date(2018, 1, 15))\n            .notional(1_000_000)\n            .fixedRate(0.0055)\n            .index(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_3M)\n            .indexInterpolated(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_6M)\n            .dayCount(DayCounts.ACT_360)\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected3, filtered.get(2));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_fra_counterpartyColumnPresentNoScheme() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.load(FILE_CPTY2);\n\n    List<FraTrade> filtered = trades.getValue().stream()\n        .flatMap(filtering(FraTrade.class))\n        .collect(toImmutableList());\n    assertThat(filtered).hasSize(3);\n\n    FraTrade expected1 = FraConventions.of(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_3M)\n        .createTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), Period.ofMonths(2), BUY, 1_000_000, 0.005, REF_DATA)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123401\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(11, 5))\n            .zone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .counterparty(StandardId.of(\"OG-Counterparty\", \"Bank A\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected1, filtered.get(0));\n\n    FraTrade expected2 = FraConventions.of(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_6M)\n        .toTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), date(2018, 2, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), SELL, 1_000_000, 0.007)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123402\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(12, 35))\n            .zone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n            .counterparty(StandardId.of(\"OG-Counterparty\", \"Bank B\"))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected2, filtered.get(1));\n\n    FraTrade expected3 = FraTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123403\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .product(Fra.builder()\n            .buySell(SELL)\n            .startDate(date(2017, 8, 1))\n            .endDate(date(2018, 1, 15))\n            .notional(1_000_000)\n            .fixedRate(0.0055)\n            .index(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_3M)\n            .indexInterpolated(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_6M)\n            .dayCount(DayCounts.ACT_360)\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    assertBeanEquals(expected3, filtered.get(2));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_swap() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.load(FILE);\n\n    List<SwapTrade> filtered = trades.getValue().stream()\n        .flatMap(filtering(SwapTrade.class))\n        .collect(toImmutableList());\n    assertThat(filtered).hasSize(NUMBER_SWAPS);\n\n    SwapTrade expected0 = expectedSwap0();\n    SwapTrade expected1 = expectedSwap1();\n    SwapTrade expected2 = expectedSwap2();\n    SwapTrade expected3 = expectedSwap3();\n    SwapTrade expected4 = expectedSwap4();\n    SwapTrade expected5 = expectedSwap5();\n    SwapTrade expected6 = expectedSwap6();\n    SwapTrade expected7 = expectedSwap7();\n\n    assertBeanEquals(expected0, filtered.get(0));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected1, filtered.get(1));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected2, filtered.get(2));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected3, filtered.get(3));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected4, filtered.get(4));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected5, filtered.get(5));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected6, filtered.get(6));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected7, filtered.get(7));\n\n    checkRoundtrip(\n        SwapTrade.class, filtered, expected0, expected1, expected2, expected3, expected4, expected5, expected6, expected7);\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap0() {\n    return FixedIborSwapConventions.GBP_FIXED_1Y_LIBOR_3M\n        .createTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), Period.ofMonths(1), Tenor.ofYears(5), BUY, 2_000_000, 0.004, REF_DATA)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123411\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap1() {\n    return FixedIborSwapConventions.GBP_FIXED_6M_LIBOR_6M\n        .toTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), date(2022, 8, 1), BUY, 3_100_000, -0.0001)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123412\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap2() {\n    NotionalSchedule notionalSchedule = NotionalSchedule.of(GBP,\n        ValueSchedule.of(\n            5_000_000,\n            ValueStep.of(date(2018, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(4_000_000)),\n            ValueStep.of(date(2019, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(3_000_000)),\n            ValueStep.of(date(2020, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(2_000_000)),\n            ValueStep.of(date(2021, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(1_000_000))));\n    Swap expectedSwap = Swap.builder()\n        .legs(\n
