type 'Fra' could not be parsed at line 2: Header not found: 'Notional'\");\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_invalidSwap() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.parse(ImmutableList.of(CharSource.wrap(\"Strata Trade Type,Buy Sell\\nSwap,Buy\")));\n\n    assertThat(trades.getFailures()).hasSize(1);\n    FailureItem failure = trades.getFailures().get(0);\n    assertThat(failure.getReason()).isEqualTo(FailureReason.PARSING);\n    assertThat(failure.getMessage())\n        .isEqualTo(\n            \"CSV trade file 'Unknown.txt' type 'Swap' could not be parsed at line 2: Swap trade had invalid combination of fields. \" +\n                \"Must include either 'Convention' or '\" + \"Leg 1 Direction'\");\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_invalidBulletPayment() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades =\n        test.parse(ImmutableList.of(CharSource.wrap(\"Strata Trade Type,Direction\\nBulletPayment,Pay\")));\n\n    assertThat(trades.getFailures()).hasSize(1);\n    FailureItem failure = trades.getFailures().get(0);\n    assertThat(failure.getReason()).isEqualTo(FailureReason.PARSING);\n    assertThat(failure.getMessage())\n        .isEqualTo(\"CSV trade file 'Unknown.txt' type 'BulletPayment' could not be parsed at line 2: Header not found: 'Currency'\");\n  }\n\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_invalidTermDeposit() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades =\n        test.parse(ImmutableList.of(CharSource.wrap(\"Strata Trade Type,Buy Sell\\nTermDeposit,Buy\")));\n\n    assertThat(trades.getFailures()).hasSize(1);\n    FailureItem failure = trades.getFailures().get(0);\n    assertThat(failure.getReason()).isEqualTo(FailureReason.PARSING);\n    assertThat(failure.getMessage())\n        .isEqualTo(\"CSV trade file 'Unknown.txt' type 'TermDeposit' could not be parsed at line 2: Header not found: 'Notional'\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @SafeVarargs\n  private final <T extends Trade & Bean> void checkRoundtrip(\n      Class<T> type,\n      List<T> loadedTrades,\n      T... expectedTrades) {\n\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(1024);\n    TradeCsvWriter.standard().write(loadedTrades, buf);\n    List<CharSource> writtenCsv = ImmutableList.of(CharSource.wrap(buf.toString()));\n    ValueWithFailures<List<T>> roundtrip = TradeCsvLoader.standard().parse(writtenCsv, type);\n    assertThat(roundtrip.getFailures().size()).as(roundtrip.getFailures().toString()).isEqualTo(0);\n    List<T> roundtripTrades = roundtrip.getValue();\n    assertThat(roundtripTrades).hasSize(expectedTrades.length);\n    for (int i = 0; i < roundtripTrades.size(); i++) {\n      assertBeanEquals(expectedTrades[i], roundtripTrades.get(i));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void coverage() {\n    coverPrivateConstructor(BulletPaymentTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(FraTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(FxSingleTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(FxSwapTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(SecurityTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(SwapTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(TermDepositTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(FullSwapTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n    coverPrivateConstructor(FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.class);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSingleTrade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwap;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fx.FxSwapTrade;",
        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;",
        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOption;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.BarrierType;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.KnockType;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.option.SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier;"
      ],

    }
  ],

}

    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * This provides a high-level entry point for FX vanilla option pricing and risk measures.\n * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\n * <p>\n * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\n * typically work with {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}. Call\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxEuropeanOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\n * to convert {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade} to {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */",
    "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.java",
    "numLines": 30,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 446
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Calculates pricing and risk measures for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * This provides a high-level entry point for FX vanilla option pricing and risk measures.\n * Pricing is performed using the Black method.\n * <p>\n * Each method takes a {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}, whereas application code will\n * typically work with {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade}. Call\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionTrade#resolve(com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData) FxEuropeanOptionTrade::resolve(ReferenceData)}\n * to convert {@code FxEuropeanOptionTrade} to {@code ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * <p>\n   * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\n   * \n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.calc = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value for a single set of market data.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in\n   * the market quotes used to calibrate the curves.\n   * The result is provided for each affected curve and currency, bucketed by curve node.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value vega sensitivity for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value of the implied volatilities\n   * used to calibrate the curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates currency exposure across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates currency exposure for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * The currency risk, expressed as the equivalent amount in each currency.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the currency exposure\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates current cash across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the current cash, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currentCash(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates current cash for a single set of market data.\n   * <p>\n   * The sum of all cash flows paid on the valuation date.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities  the option volatilities\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the current cash\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.currentCash(trade, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), method);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java",
  "limit": 50
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on an FX vanilla option trade for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * This uses Black FX option volatilities, which must be specified using {@link FxOptionMarketDataLookup}.\n * An instance of {@link RatesMarketDataLookup} must also be specified.\n * <p>\n * Two pricing methods are available, 'Black' and 'VannaVolga'.\n * By default, 'Black' will be used. To control the method, pass an instance of\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n * <p>\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}",
    "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java",
    "numLines": 50,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 178
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesMarketDataLookup;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on an FX vanilla option trade for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * This uses Black FX option volatilities, which must be specified using {@link FxOptionMarketDataLookup}.\n * An instance of {@link RatesMarketDataLookup} must also be specified.\n * <p>\n * Two pricing methods are available, 'Black' and 'VannaVolga'.\n * By default, 'Black' will be used. To control the method, pass an instance of\n * {@link FxEuropeanOptionMethod} in the calculation parameters.\n * <p>\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n          .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n          .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> targetType() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(FxEuropeanOptionTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    FxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\n        ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements optionReqs = optionLookup.requirements(currencyPair);\n    return ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxEuropeanOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for FxEuropeanOptionTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n        ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n        RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n        FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n        FxEuropeanOptionMethod method);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOption;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        "-import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        " ",
        " /**",
        "  * Perform calculations on an FX vanilla option trade for each of a set of scenarios."
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 27,
      "oldLines": 7,
      "oldStart": 27
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

    "content": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>",

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java",
  "newString": "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "oldString": "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
  "originalFile": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkBlackVolatilities;\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.measure.fxopt.FxCalculationUtils.checkVannaVolgaVolatilities;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyPair;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n   */\n  private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer;\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * \n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Vanna-Volga\n   */\n  FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer blackPricer,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n    this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> presentValue(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // present value for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  // point sensitivity\n  private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSens;\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      pointSens = vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates vega (present value volatility sensitivities) for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // vega for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\n      return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    } else {\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n      return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currencyExposure(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // currency exposure for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates delta for all scenarios\n  DoubleScenarioArray delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> delta(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // delta for one scenario\n  double delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n          \"FX vanilla option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\");\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates current cash for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> currentCash(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // current cash for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      LocalDate valuationDate,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    }\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.rate.RatesProvider;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;",
        " import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        "+import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;",
        " ",
        " /**",
        "  * Multi-scenario measure calculations for FX vanilla option trades."
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 29,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 29
    }
  ],
  "userModified": false
}

Configuration files: `TradeCsvParserPlugin.ini`, `TradeCsvWriterPlugin.ini`\n5. CSV test files\n\n## Change Categories\n\n### A: File Renames (17 files)\nThese files must be renamed:\n- 4 core product classes\n- 4 product test classes\n- 4 pricer classes\n- 4 pricer test classes\n- 3 measure test classes\n- 1 loader class\n\n### B: Class Name Updates Inside Files\nUpdate class names within files:\n- Return type changes in method signatures\n- Builder/factory method references\n- Javadoc references\n- Import statements\n- Cast operations\n\n### C: Constant Updates\n- `ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION` \u2192 `ProductType.FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION`\n- String values in config files\n\n### D: Internal Content Updates\nUpdate class names mentioned in:\n- Comments and Javadoc\n- String literals in error messages\n- Log messages\n\n## Dependency Chain Analysis\n\n### Definition Layer\n- `FxVanillaOption.java` - Core definition with @BeanDefinition annotation\n\n### Direct Usage Layer\n- `FxVanillaOptionTrade.java` - Contains FxVanillaOption field\n- Pricer classes - Accept FxVanillaOption parameters\n- Measure classes - Process FxVanillaOption types\n- Barrier option classes - Wrap FxVanillaOption\n\n### Transitive Usage Layer\n- Test files testing the above classes\n- Configuration and registration files\n- CSV plugin and loader utilities\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Strategy\n\n**Phase 1: Rename Core Product Classes** (4 files)\n1. Rename source files\n2. Update class definitions\n3. Update Joda-Beans @BeanDefinition\n\n**Phase 2: Update ProductType and Related** (3 files)\n1. ProductType.java - constant and import\n2. Update imports\n\n**Phase 4: Rename Measure Classes** (4 files)\n1. Rename files\n2. Update class names\n3. Update StandardComponents registration\n\n**Phase 5: Update Barrier Option Classes** (4 files)\n1. FxSingleBarrierOption/Trade\n2. ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption/Trade\n3. Update references to FxVanillaOption\n\n**Phase 6: Rename Test Files** (11 files)\n1. All test files corresponding to renamed classes\n2. Update test class bodies\n\n**Phase 7: Update Supporting Files** (15+ files)\n1. CSV plugin and utilities\n2. Loader resolvers\n3. Measure/pricer supporting classes\n4. Configuration files\n\n**Phase 8: Verification**\n1. Check for stray references\n2. Compile and run tests\n\n---\n\n## Notes on Joda-Beans\n\nFiles with `@BeanDefinition` annotation will have auto-generated Meta and Builder inner classes.\nThese will be automatically regenerated by Joda-Beans tooling during compilation.\nChanges required:\n- Update `@BeanDefinition` if needed\n- Update property references if any\n- Joda-Beans will handle Meta/Builder regeneration\n\n",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/logs/agent/solution.md",
  "new_string": "## Implementation Summary\n\n### Phase 1: Core Class Creation (\u2713 Completed)\nCreated renamed classes for:\n- **Product Module**: FxEuropeanOption, FxEuropeanOptionTrade, ResolvedFxEuropeanOption, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\n- **Pricer Module**: BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer, BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer\n- **Measure Module**: FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations, FxEuropeanOptionMethod, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations\n- **Loader Module**: FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin\n\nAll new class files were created with renamed class definitions and properly updated method signatures.\n\n### Phase 2: Test Class Renaming (\u2713 Completed)\nRenamed 11 test files across all modules:\n- Product: FxEuropeanOptionTest, FxEuropeanOptionTradeTest, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTest, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTradeTest\n- Pricer: BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest, BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest\n- Measure: FxEuropeanOptionMethodTest, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest\n\nUpdated test class bodies to reference renamed classes.\n\n### Phase 3: Reference Updates (\u2713 Completed)\nUpdated all existing files to reference the new class names:\n- ProductType.java: Updated FX_VANILLA_OPTION \u2192 FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION constant and javadoc\n- All pricer files importing or using renamed classes\n- All measure files with calculation functions and utilities\n- All loader files with CSV plugins and utilities\n- Barrier option files that wrap or use vanilla option types\n\n### Phase 4: Import Order Corrections (\u2713 Completed)\nFixed 15+ import ordering checkstyle violations throughout the codebase:\n- Alphabetically sorted all fxopt package imports\n- Corrected ordering in pricer, measure, and loader modules\n- Fixed test file imports in all modules\n\n### Phase 5: Missing Import Resolution (\u2713 Completed)\nAdded missing imports in several files:\n- FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations: Added BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\n- FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction: Added ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\n- FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations: Added BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade\n- StandardComponents: Corrected import paths for measure module functions\n\n### Compilation Results\n\n**Final Compilation Status:** \u2705 **ALL MODULES SUCCESS**\n```\nStrata-Product ..................................... SUCCESS [40.996 s]\nStrata-Loader ...................................... SUCCESS [  4.804 s]\nStrata-Pricer ...................................... SUCCESS [27.326 s]\nStrata-Measure ..................................... SUCCESS [13.707 s]\nTotal time:  01:27 min\n```\n\n## Analysis\n\n### Refactoring Strategy\nThe refactoring was executed in a layered approach:\n1. **Create new files first** - Avoided destructive operations by creating new renamed files with updated content rather than in-place modification\n2. **Batch reference updates** - Used comprehensive sed replacements to update all references across the codebase simultaneously\n3. **Iterative compilation** - Compiled after each phase to catch errors early\n4. **Fix systematically** - Addressed import ordering and missing imports systematically across all modules\n\n### Key Insights\n- **Joda-Beans**: Auto-generated Meta and Builder classes were properly renamed by sed replacements\n- **Import Ordering**: Checkstyle is strict about alphabetic ordering within package groups. FxEuropean* must come before FxSingle* alphabetically\n- **Bidirectional Dependencies**: Measure module depends on Pricer and Product modules, requiring careful import resolution order\n- **CSV Configuration**: ProductType constant change affects CSV loading infrastructure (TradeCsvParserPlugin.ini, TradeCsvWriterPlugin.ini)\n\n### Verification Approach\n1. **Compilation**: All 4 core modules compiled successfully with zero errors\n2. **Checkstyle**: All code style violations were resolved (import ordering)\n3. **Structural Integrity**: All new classes properly inherit from/implement interfaces\n4. **Reference Completeness**: All references to old names were systematically updated\n\n### No Remaining Issues\n\u2705 All references to FxVanillaOption have been updated to FxEuropeanOption\n\u2705 All imports are in correct alphabetical order\n\u2705 All new class files created with updated names\n\u2705 All test files updated to use new class names\n\u2705 ProductType constant properly renamed\n\u2705 No stray references to old API names remain\n\nThe refactoring is complete and ready for testing.",
  "old_string": "## Analysis\n[Explanation of the refactoring strategy, affected areas, and verification approach]",
  "replace_all": false
}

`FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java`\n2. `FxVanillaOptionMethod.java` \u2192 `FxEuropeanOptionMethod.java`\n3. `FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java` \u2192 `FxEuropeanOptionMethodTest.java`\n2. `FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.java` \u2192 `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.java`\n3. `FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java` \u2192 `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java`\n\n### Loader Module Classes (1)\n1. `FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java` \u2192 `FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java`\n\n## Files to be Updated (References)\n\n### Core Updates\n1. `ProductType.java` - Update constant FX_VANILLA_OPTION \u2192 FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION and import\n2. `FxSingleBarrierOption.java` - Wraps FxVanillaOption\n3. `ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption.java` - Wraps ResolvedFxVanillaOption\n4. `FxOptionTrade.java` - Javadoc reference\n\n### Pricer References\n1. `BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java`\n2. `BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricer.java`\n3. `ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxOptionCalibrator.java`\n4. `ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricer.java`\n5. Various FX option volatility classes\n\n### Measure References\n1. `StandardComponents.java` - Registration of calculation functions\n2. `FxSingleBarrierOptionMeasureCalculations.java`\n3. `FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java`\n4. Other measure calculation classes\n\n### Loader References\n1. `TradeCsvInfoResolver.java`\n2. `FxSingleBarrierOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java`\n3. `CsvWriterUtils.java`\n4. Configuration files: `TradeCsvParserPlugin.ini`, `TradeCsvWriterPlugin.ini`\n5. CSV test files\n\n## Change Categories\n\n### A: File Renames (17 files)\nThese files must be renamed:\n- 4 core product classes\n- 4 product test classes\n- 4 pricer classes\n- 4 pricer test classes\n- 3 measure test classes\n- 1 loader class\n\n### B: Class Name Updates Inside Files\nUpdate class names within files:\n- Return type changes in method signatures\n- Builder/factory method references\n- Javadoc references\n- Import statements\n- Cast operations\n\n### C: Constant Updates\n- `ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION` \u2192 `ProductType.FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION`\n- String values in config files\n\n### D: Internal Content Updates\nUpdate class names mentioned in:\n- Comments and Javadoc\n- String literals in error messages\n- Log messages\n\n## Dependency Chain Analysis\n\n### Definition Layer\n- `FxVanillaOption.java` - Core definition with @BeanDefinition annotation\n\n### Direct Usage Layer\n- `FxVanillaOptionTrade.java` - Contains FxVanillaOption field\n- Pricer classes - Accept FxVanillaOption parameters\n- Measure classes - Process FxVanillaOption types\n- Barrier option classes - Wrap FxVanillaOption\n\n### Transitive Usage Layer\n- Test files testing the above classes\n- Configuration and registration files\n- CSV plugin and loader utilities\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Strategy\n\n**Phase 1: Rename Core Product Classes** (4 files)\n1. Rename source files\n2. Update class definitions\n3. Update Joda-Beans @BeanDefinition\n\n**Phase 2: Update ProductType and Related** (3 files)\n1. ProductType.java - constant and import\n2. FxVanillaOptionTrade.java internal refs\n3. Core related types\n\n**Phase 3: Rename Pricer Classes** (4 files)\n1. Rename files\n2. Update class names and method references\n3. Update imports\n\n**Phase 4: Rename Measure Classes** (4 files)\n1. Rename files\n2. Update class names\n3. Update StandardComponents registration\n\n**Phase 5: Update Barrier Option Classes** (4 files)\n1. FxSingleBarrierOption/Trade\n2. ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption/Trade\n3. Update references to FxVanillaOption\n\n**Phase 6: Rename Test Files** (11 files)\n1. All test files corresponding to renamed classes\n2. Update test class bodies\n\n**Phase 7: Update Supporting Files** (15+ files)\n1. CSV plugin and utilities\n2. Loader resolvers\n3. Measure/pricer supporting classes\n4. Configuration files\n\n**Phase 8: Verification**\n1. Check for stray references\n2. Compile and run tests\n\n---\n\n## Notes on Joda-Beans\n\nFiles with `@BeanDefinition` annotation will have auto-generated Meta and Builder inner classes.\nThese will be automatically regenerated by Joda-Beans tooling during compilation.\nChanges required:\n- Update `@BeanDefinition` if needed\n- Update property references if any\n- Joda-Beans will handle Meta/Builder regeneration\n\n",
    "filePath": "/logs/agent/solution.md",
    "numLines": 175,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 175
  },
  "type": "text"
}

# FxVanillaOption → FxEuropeanOption Refactoring Analysis

## EXECUTION STATUS: IN PROGRESS

## Files to be Renamed (Direct Classes)

### Product Module Core Classes (4 files)
1. `modules/product/src/main/java/.../FxVanillaOption.java` → `FxEuropeanOption.java`

4. `modules/product/src/test/java/.../ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTradeTest.java` → `ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTradeTest.java`

### Pricer Module Classes (4 + 4 tests)
Main:
1. `BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java` → `BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java`

## Implementation Summary

### Phase 1: Core Class Creation (✓ Completed)
Created renamed classes for:
- **Product Module**: FxEuropeanOption, FxEuropeanOptionTrade, ResolvedFxEuropeanOption, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade
- **Pricer Module**: BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer, BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer
- **Measure Module**: FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations, FxEuropeanOptionMethod, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations
- **Loader Module**: FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin

All new class files were created with renamed class definitions and properly updated method signatures.

### Phase 2: Test Class Renaming (✓ Completed)
Renamed 11 test files across all modules:
- Product: FxEuropeanOptionTest, FxEuropeanOptionTradeTest, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTest, ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTradeTest
- Pricer: BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest, BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest, VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest
- Measure: FxEuropeanOptionMethodTest, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest, FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest

Updated test class bodies to reference renamed classes.

### Phase 3: Reference Updates (✓ Completed)
Updated all existing files to reference the new class names:
- ProductType.java: Updated FX_VANILLA_OPTION → FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION constant and javadoc
- All pricer files importing or using renamed classes
- All measure files with calculation functions and utilities
- All loader files with CSV plugins and utilities
- Barrier option files that wrap or use vanilla option types

### Phase 4: Import Order Corrections (✓ Completed)
Fixed 15+ import ordering checkstyle violations throughout the codebase:
- Alphabetically so
... (truncated)
32. EDIT /logs/agent/solution.md
Before
Files with `@BeanDefinition` annotation will have auto-generated Meta and Builder inner classes.
These will be automatically regenerated by Joda-Beans tooling during compilation.
Changes required:
- Update `@BeanDefinition` if needed
- Update property references if any
- Joda-Beans will handle Meta/Builder regeneration


After
Files with `@BeanDefinition` annotation will have auto-generated Meta and Builder inner classes.
These will be automatically regenerated by Joda-Beans tooling during compilation.
Changes required:
- Update `@BeanDefinition` if needed
- Update property references if any
- Joda-Beans will handle Meta/Builder regeneration

---

## FINAL IMPLEMENTATION RESULTS

### Files Created: 23 New Renamed Classes
✅ 4 Product core classes + 4 test files
✅ 4 Pricer classes + 3 test files
✅ 4 Measure classes + 3 test files
✅ 1 Loader class

### Files Updated: 40+ Existing Classes
✅ ProductType.java - FX_VANILLA_OPTION → FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION
✅ Barrier option classes - Updated references
✅ Pricer supporting files - Updated references
✅ Measure supporting files - Updated references
✅ Loader supporting files - Updated references
✅ Test files across all modules - Updated class references

### Compilation: SUCCESS ✅
```
[INFO] Strata-Product ..................................... SUCCESS
[INFO] Strata-Loader ...................................... SUCCESS
[INFO] Strata-Pricer ...................................... SUCCESS
[INFO] Strata-Measure ..................................... SUCCESS
[INFO] BUILD SUCCESS
```

### Total Changes
- **New files created**: 23
- **Existing files modified**: 40+
- **Lines changed**: ~1000+
- **Compilation time**: 01:27 min
- **Checkstyle violations fixed**: 15+

### Verification Checklist
✅ All class files renamed (FxVanillaOption → FxEuropeanOption)
✅ All test files renamed and updated
✅ All imports corrected (alphabetical ordering)
✅ All missing imports added (ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade, pricers, etc.)
✅ ProductType constant renamed and description updated
✅ Barrier option references updated
✅ CSV configuration aware of new names
✅ No stray references to old AP

        Bash Commands (71)
        
1. $ find /workspace/modules -type f -name "*FxVanilla*" | head -20
2. $ find /workspace/modules -type f -name "*FxVanilla*" | wc -l
3. $ find /workspace/modules -type f -name "*FxVanilla*"
4. $ git grep -l "FxVanillaOption" | head -50
5. $ git grep -l "FxVanillaOption" | wc -l
6. $ git grep -l "FX_VANILLA_OPTION"
