8. $ find /workspace/modules -path "*/fx/*" -name "*.java" -type f | grep -E "(Option|vanilla)" | head -50
9. $ grep -r "FX_VANILLA_OPTION" /workspace/modules --include="*.java" -l
10. $ grep -r "\.FxVanillaOption\b" /workspace/modules --include="*.java" -l | head -20
11. $ find /workspace/modules -type f -name "*.java" -path "*fxopt*" | wc -l
12. $ find /workspace/modules/product -type f -name "*.java" -path "*fxopt*" | sort
13. $ find /workspace/modules/pricer -type f -name "*.java" -path "*fxopt*" | sort
14. $ find /workspace/modules/measure -type f -name "*.java" -path "*fxopt*" | sort
15. $ find /workspace/modules/loader -type f -name "*.java" | xargs grep -l "FxVanillaOption\|FX_VANILLA_OPTION" | sort
16. $ grep -r "FxVanillaOptionTrade\|FxVanillaOption[^T]" /workspace/modules --include="*.java" -l | grep -v "/fxopt/" | sort
17. $ grep -r "ProductType.FX_VANILLA_OPTION\|FX_VANILLA_OPTION" /workspace/modules --include="*.java" -l | sort
18. $ find /workspace/modules -type f -name "*.java" | xargs grep -l "import.*FxVanillaOption\|import.*fxopt.Fx" | grep -v "/fxopt/" | sort
19. $ find modules -path "*fxopt*" -name "*Test.java" | head -5
20. $ mvn test -pl modules/product -Dtest=FxVanillaOptionTest 2>&1 | head -100
21. $ timeout 120 mvn clean compile -pl modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -50
22. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -100
23. $ find /workspace/modules -name "*FxEuropean*" -o -name "*European*Option*" | head -20
24. $ git grep -r "FxEuropeanOption" modules/
25. $ cat > /tmp/refactor.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Function to rename and update a file
rename_and_update() {
    local old_name="$1"
    local new_name="$2"
    local old_class="$3"
    local new_class="$4"
    local file_path="$5"
    
    if [ ! -f "$file_path" ]; then
        return
    fi
    
    local dir=$(dirname "$file_path")
    local new_path="$dir/$new_name"
    
    # Copy file with new name
    cp "$file_path" "$new_path"
    
    # Update content - replace class names and references
    sed -i "s/\b${old_class}\b/${new_class}/g" "$new_path"
    
    # Update resolved references
    sed -i "s/Resolved${old_class}/Resolved${new_class}/g" "$new_path"
    
    echo "Created: $new_path"
}

cd /workspace

# Phase 1: Product module - Core classes
echo "=== Phase 1: Product Core Classes ==="
rename_and_update "FxVanillaOption.java" "FxEuropeanOption.java" "FxVanillaOption" "FxEuropeanOption" "modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOption.java"
rename_and_update "FxVanillaOptionTrade.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTrade.java" "FxVanillaOptionTrade" "FxEuropeanOptionTrade" "modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTrade.java"
rename_and_update "ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOption.java" "ResolvedFxVanillaOption" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOption" "modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java"
rename_and_update "ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade.java" "ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade" "modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java"

# Phasing 2: Pricer classes
echo "=== Phase 2: Pricer Classes ==="
rename_and_update "BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java" "BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java" "BlackFxVanillaOption" "BlackFxEuropeanOption" "modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java"
rename_and_update "BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java" "BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java" "BlackFxVanillaOption" "BlackFxEuropeanOption" "modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java"
rename_and_update "VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java" "VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer.java" "VannaVolgaFxVanillaOption" "VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOption" "modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java"
rename_and_update "VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java" "VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java" "VannaVolgaFxVanillaOption" "VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOption" "modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java"

# Phase 3: Measure classes
echo "=== Phase 3: Measure Classes ==="
rename_and_update "FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java" "FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.java" "FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations" "FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations" "modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java"
rename_and_update "FxVanillaOptionMethod.java" "FxEuropeanOptionMethod.java" "FxVanillaOptionMethod" "FxEuropeanOptionMethod" "modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethod.java"
rename_and_update "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java" "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction" "modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction.java"
rename_and_update "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations.java" "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations" "modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations.java"

# Phase 4: Loader classes
echo "=== Phase 4: Loader Classes ==="
rename_and_update "FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java" "FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCsvPlugin" "modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv/FxVanillaOptionTradeCsvPlugin.java"

echo "=== File renames complete ==="
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/refactor.sh
bash /tmp/refactor.sh

26. $ cat > /tmp/refactor_tests.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

rename_test() {
    local old_name="$1"
    local new_name="$2"
    local old_class="$3"
    local new_class="$4"
    local file_path="$5"
    
    if [ ! -f "$file_path" ]; then
        return
    fi
    
    local dir=$(dirname "$file_path")
    local new_path="$dir/$new_name"
    
    cp "$file_path" "$new_path"
    sed -i "s/\b${old_class}\b/${new_class}/g" "$new_path"
    sed -i "s/Resolved${old_class}/Resolved${new_class}/g" "$new_path"
    sed -i "s/Black${old_class}/Black${new_class}/g" "$new_path"
    sed -i "s/VannaVolga${old_class}/VannaVolga${new_class}/g" "$new_path"
    
    echo "Created: $new_path"
}

cd /workspace

# Product test files
echo "=== Product Test Classes ==="
rename_test "FxVanillaOptionTest.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTest.java" "FxVanillaOption" "FxEuropeanOption" "modules/product/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTest.java"
rename_test "FxVanillaOptionTradeTest.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeTest.java" "FxVanillaOptionTrade" "FxEuropeanOptionTrade" "modules/product/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeTest.java"
rename_test "ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTest.java" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTest.java" "ResolvedFxVanillaOption" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOption" "modules/product/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTest.java"
rename_test "ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTradeTest.java" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTradeTest.java" "ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade" "ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade" "modules/product/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTradeTest.java"

# Pricer test files
echo "=== Pricer Test Classes ==="
rename_test "BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricerTest.java" "BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest.java" "BlackFxVanillaOption" "BlackFxEuropeanOption" "modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricerTest.java"
rename_test "BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricerTest.java" "BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest.java" "BlackFxVanillaOption" "BlackFxEuropeanOption" "modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricerTest.java"
rename_test "VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricerTest.java" "VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest.java" "VannaVolgaFxVanillaOption" "VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOption" "modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricerTest.java"

# Measure test files
echo "=== Measure Test Classes ==="
rename_test "FxVanillaOptionMethodTest.java" "FxEuropeanOptionMethodTest.java" "FxVanillaOptionMethod" "FxEuropeanOptionMethod" "modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethodTest.java"
rename_test "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.java" "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction" "modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.java"
rename_test "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java" "FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations" "FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations" "modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java"

echo "=== Test file renames complete ==="
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/refactor_tests.sh
bash /tmp/refactor_tests.sh

27. $ cat > /tmp/update_refs.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

cd /workspace

# Update all remaining files with FxVanillaOption references to FxEuropeanOption
# This handles imports, method calls, variable names, etc.

echo "Updating references in all Java files..."

# Replace class names and imports 
find modules -name "*.java" -type f ! -path "*FxEuropeanOption*" ! -path "*FxVanillaOption.java" ! -path "*ResolvedFxVanillaOption.java" ! -path "*FxVanillaOptionTrade.java" ! -path "*ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade.java" ! -path "*BlackFxVanillaOption*" ! -path "*VannaVolgaFxVanillaOption*" ! -path "*FxVanillaOptionMethod*" ! -path "*FxVanillaOptionMeasure*" ! -path "*FxVanillaOptionTrade*" ! -path "*FxVanillaOptionCsvPlugin.java" | while read file; do
  sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOption\b/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
done

# Update ProductType constant
sed -i 's/FX_VANILLA_OPTION/FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION/g' modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/ProductType.java

# Update CSV configuration files
sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption/FxEuropeanOption/g' modules/loader/src/main/resources/META-INF/com/opengamma/strata/config/base/TradeCsvParserPlugin.ini
sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption/FxEuropeanOption/g' modules/loader/src/main/resources/META-INF/com/opengamma/strata/config/base/TradeCsvWriterPlugin.ini

echo "Reference updates complete"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/update_refs.sh
bash /tmp/update_refs.sh

  modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer.java \
  modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer.java \
  modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricerTest.java \
  modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricerTest.java \
  modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricerTest.java \
  modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations.java \

  modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionMethodTest.java \
  modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.java \
  modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java \

29. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -100
30. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -50
31. $ cat > /tmp/fix_remaining.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

cd /workspace

# Fix any remaining old class name references in the newly created files
for file in $(find modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt -name "*FxEuropean*.java"); do
  sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOption\b/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/FX_VANILLA_OPTION/FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION/g' "$file"
done

# Same for pricer
for file in $(find modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt -name "*FxEuropean*.java"); do
  sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOption\b/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/BlackFxVanillaOption/BlackFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOption/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
done

# Same for measure
for file in $(find modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt -name "*FxEuropean*.java"); do
  sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOption\b/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
done

# Same for loader
for file in $(find modules/loader/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/loader/csv -name "*FxEuropean*.java"); do
  sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOption\b/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
done

# Fix test files
for file in $(find modules -path "*test*" -name "*FxEuropean*.java"); do
  sed -i 's/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOption\b/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/BlackFxVanillaOption/BlackFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOption/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOption/g' "$file"
  sed -i 's/FX_VANILLA_OPTION/FX_EUROPEAN_OPTION/g' "$file"
done

echo "Fixed remaining references"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/fix_remaining.sh
bash /tmp/fix_remaining.sh

32. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -50
33. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -50
34. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | grep -E "(BUILD SUCCESS|BUILD FAILURE|ERROR)" | tail -20
35. $ sed -i 's/FxVanillaOptionTrade/FxEuropeanOptionTrade/g; s/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade/ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade/g' /workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.java
36. $ cat > /tmp/fix_import_order.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

fix_import_order() {
    local file="$1"
    if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then
        return
    fi
    
    # Extract imports and sort them
    # This is complex, so we'll do it by fixing specific known cases
    
    # Replace old class references
    sed -i 's/import.*FxVanillaOptionTrade/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade/g' "$file"
    sed -i 's/import.*ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade/g' "$file"
    
    # Remove duplicate imports
    sed -i '/import.*FxVanillaOptionTrade[^a-zA-Z]/d' "$file"
    sed -i '/import.*ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade[^a-zA-Z]/d' "$file"
}

cd /workspace

# Fix all Java files
find modules/pricer -name "*.java" -type f | while read file; do
    fix_import_order "$file"
done

find modules/measure -name "*.java" -type f | while read file; do
    fix_import_order "$file"
done

find modules/loader -name "*.java" -type f | while read file; do
    fix_import_order "$file"
done

echo "Fixed imports"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/fix_import_order.sh
bash /tmp/fix_import_order.sh

37. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | grep -E "(BUILD SUCCESS|BUILD FAILURE|ERROR)" | head -20
38. $ cat > /tmp/fix_test_imports.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

cd /workspace

# Fix BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest
sed -i '/import.*FxEuropeanOptionTrade/d; /import.*ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/{s/.*//;x;s/^/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\n/;x;}' modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest.java

# More direct approach - read and fix each file
fix_test_file() {
    local file="$1"
    if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then
        return
    fi
    
    # Get the line numbers where imports are
    local lines=$(grep -n "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.*" "$file" | cut -d: -f1)
    
    # Extract all fxopt imports
    local imports=$(grep "import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.*" "$file" | sort)
    
    if [ ! -z "$imports" ]; then
        # Delete old imports
        sed -i '/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt/d' "$file"
        
        # Add sorted imports back after "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer..."
        local insert_line=$(grep -n "import com.opengamma.strata.pricer" "$file" | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)
        if [ -z "$insert_line" ]; then
            insert_line=$(grep -n "^import" "$file" | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)
        fi
        
        if [ ! -z "$insert_line" ]; then
            sed -i "${insert_line}a\\$(echo "$imports" | sed 's/$/\\/')" "$file"
        fi
    fi
}

# This is getting complex - let me use Python instead
python3 << 'PYTHON'
import os
import re

def fix_imports(filepath):
    if not os.path.exists(filepath):
        return
    
    with open(filepath, 'r') as f:
        content = f.read()
    
    # Extract all imports
    import_lines = re.findall(r'^import .*$', content, re.MULTILINE)
    
    # Remove duplicate/old class references
    content = re.sub(r'FxVanillaOptionTrade\b', 'FxEuropeanOptionTrade', content)
    content = re.sub(r'ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade\b', 'ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade', content)
    content = re.sub(r'ResolvedFxVanillaOption\b', 'ResolvedFxEuropeanOption', content)
    content = re.sub(r'FxVanillaOption\b', 'FxEuropeanOption', content)
    
    with open(filepath, 'w') as f:
        f.write(content)

# Fix test files
for root, dirs, files in os.walk('/workspace/modules/pricer/src/test'):
    for file in files:
        if file.endswith('.java'):
            fix_imports(os.path.join(root, file))

for root, dirs, files in os.walk('/workspace/modules/measure/src/test'):
    for file in files:
        if file.endswith('.java'):
            fix_imports(os.path.join(root, file))

for root, dirs, files in os.walk('/workspace/modules/loader/src/test'):
    for file in files:
        if file.endswith('.java'):
            fix_imports(os.path.join(root, file))

print("Fixed test file references")
PYTHON

EOF
chmod +x /tmp/fix_test_imports.sh
bash /tmp/fix_test_imports.sh

39. $ grep -n "import.*fxopt" /workspace/modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest.java
40. $ timeout 300 mvn checkstyle:checkstyle -pl modules/pricer 2>&1 | grep "BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricerTest" -A 2 -B 2
41. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -80
42. $ cat > /tmp/fix_remaining_tests.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Fix BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricerTest
sed -i '/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFx/{
  /ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/{
    N
    s/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;/
  }
}' /workspace/modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/BlackFxSingleBarrierOptionTradePricerTest.java

# Fix ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricerTest
sed -i '/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFx/{
  /ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/{
    N
    s/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;/
  }
}' /workspace/modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/ImpliedTrinomialTreeFxSingleBarrierOptionProductPricerTest.java

# For VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest, need to check the import order
sed -i '/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt/{
  /FxEuropeanOptionTrade/{
    N
    s/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;/import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.FxEuropeanOptionTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxSingleBarrierOption;/
  }
}' /workspace/modules/pricer/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricerTest.java

echo "Fixed remaining test imports"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/fix_remaining_tests.sh
bash /tmp/fix_remaining_tests.sh

43. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -20
44. $ git grep -l "ResolvedFxVanillaOption" modules/pricer/src/main/ || echo "No matches"
45. $ git grep "FxVanillaOption\|ResolvedFxVanillaOption" modules/pricer/src/main/ 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "Checking with sed instead..."
46. $ sed -i 's/BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer/BlackFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer/g' $(find modules/pricer -name "*.java" -type f)
sed -i 's/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionProductPricer/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionProductPricer/g' $(find modules/pricer -name "*.java" -type f)
sed -i 's/VannaVolgaFxVanillaOptionTradePricer/VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer/g' $(find modules/pricer -name "*.java" -type f)
echo "Fixed pricer class references"
47. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -20
48. $ sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade/ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade/g' $(find modules/pricer -name "*.java" -type f)
echo "Fixed ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade references"
49. $ sed -i 's/ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade/ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade/g; s/ResolvedFxVanillaOption/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g; s/FxVanillaOptionTrade/FxEuropeanOptionTrade/g; s/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' $(find modules/measure modules/loader -name "*.java" -type f)
echo "Updated measure and loader modules"
50. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10
51. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -20
52. $ ls -la modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/fxopt/Resolved*Trade.java
53. $ cat > /tmp/add_missing_imports.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

cd /workspace

# For each pricer file that uses ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade, ensure the import exists
for file in $(grep -l "ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade" modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/fxopt/*.java | grep -v "\.swp"); do
  if ! grep -q "import.*ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade" "$file"; then
    # Add the import after the other ResolvedFx imports
    sed -i '/import.*ResolvedFx[a-zA-Z]*$/a import com.opengamma.strata.product.fxopt.ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade;' "$file"
  fi
done

echo "Added missing imports"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/add_missing_imports.sh
bash /tmp/add_missing_imports.sh

54. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10
55. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/measure -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10
56. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/measure -DskipTests 2>&1 | grep ERROR
57. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/measure -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10
58. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/measure -DskipTests 2>&1 | grep ERROR
59. $ cat > /tmp/fix_measure_test_imports.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

cd /workspace

# For FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest
file="modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationsTest.java"
sed -i '/import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer/{N;s/.*/import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;/;}' "$file"

# For FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest
file="modules/measure/src/test/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/fxopt/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunctionTest.java"
sed -i '/import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer/{N;s/.*/import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.fxopt.FxOptionVolatilities;/;}' "$file"

echo "Fixed measure test imports (attempted)"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/fix_measure_test_imports.sh
bash /tmp/fix_measure_test_imports.sh

60. $ sed -i 's/FxVanillaOptionMethod/FxEuropeanOptionMethod/g; s/FxVanillaOptionTrade/FxEuropeanOptionTrade/g; s/ResolvedFxVanillaOption/ResolvedFxEuropeanOption/g; s/FxVanillaOption\b/FxEuropeanOption/g' $(find modules/measure/src/test -name "*.java" -type f)
echo "Updated measure test references"
61. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/measure -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10
62. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/measure -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10
63. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer,modules/measure -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -20
64. $ sed -i 's/FxVanillaOptionMethod\b/FxEuropeanOptionMethod/g; s/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculationFunction\b/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction/g; s/FxVanillaOptionMeasureCalculations\b/FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations/g; s/FxVanillaOptionTradeCalculations\b/FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculations/g' $(find modules/measure -name "*.java" -type f)
echo "Fixed measure references"
65. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer,modules/measure,modules/loader -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -15
66. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/loader -DskipTests 2>&1 | grep ERROR
67. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer,modules/measure,modules/loader -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -15
68. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/loader -DskipTests 2>&1 | grep -A 2 ERROR | head -20
69. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer,modules/measure,modules/loader -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -15
70. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer,modules/measure,modules/loader -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -15
71. $ timeout 300 mvn compile -pl modules/product,modules/pricer,modules/measure,modules/loader -DskipTests 2>&1 | tail -10
